Due to the low on-chip memory requirement, the consistent data format, and the simplified control logic, Gustavson’s algorithm is a promising backbone algorithm for SpMM on hardware accelerators. However, the off-chip memory traffic still limits the performance of the algorithm, especially on embedded FPGAs. Previous researchers optimize Gustavson’s algorithm targeting high bandwidth memory-based architectures and their solutions cannot be directly applied to embedded FPGAs with traditional DDRs. In this work, we propose an efficient Gustavson-based SpMM accelerator on embedded FPGAs. The proposed design fully considers the feature of off-chip memory access on embedded FPGAs and the dataflow of Gustavson’s algorithm. First, we analyze the parallelism of the algorithm and propose to perform the algorithm with element-wise parallelism, which reduces the idle time of processing elements caused by synchronization. Further, we show a counter-intuitive example that the traditional cache leads to worse performance. Then, we propose a novel access pattern-aware cache scheme called SpCache, which provides quick responses to reduce bank conflicts caused by irregular memory accesses and combines streaming and caching to handle requests that access ordered elements of unpredictable length. Moreover, we propose to perform the merge on part of partial results, which removes some redundant merges in the naive implementation and has little postprocessing overhead. Finally, we conduct experiments on the Xilinx Zynq-UltraScale ZCU106 platform with a set of benchmarks from the SuiteSparse matrix collection. The experimental results show that the proposed design achieves an average 1.75× performance speedup compared to the baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法（SpMM）是数据分析和机器学习等多个领域的重要核心。由于片上内存要求低、数据格式一致和控制逻辑简化，Gustavson 算法是硬件加速器上 SpMM 的一种很有前途的骨干算法。然而，片外内存流量仍然限制了算法的性能，尤其是在嵌入式 FPGA 上。之前的研究人员针对基于高带宽内存的架构优化了 Gustavson 的算法，他们的解决方案不能直接应用于具有传统 DDR 的嵌入式 FPGA。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 Gustavson 的嵌入式 FPGA 高效 SpMM 加速器。该设计充分考虑了嵌入式FPGA片外存储器访问的特点和Gustavson算法的数据流。首先，我们分析了算法的并行性，并提出以元素并行的方式执行算法，这减少了因同步而导致的处理元素的空闲时间。此外，我们展示了一个反直觉的例子，即传统缓存会导致性能更差。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的访问模式感知缓存方案，称为 SpCache，它提供快速响应以减少由不规则内存访问引起的存储体冲突，并结合流式传输和缓存来处理访问不可预测长度的有序元素的请求。此外，我们建议对部分结果的一部分执行合并，这消除了简单实现中的一些冗余合并，并且后处理开销很小。最后，我们使用 SuiteSparse 矩阵集合中的一组基准在 Xilinx Zynq-UltraScale ZCU106 平台上进行实验。实验结果表明，与基线相比，所提出的设计实现了平均 1.75× 性能加速。

items.title: Exploiting the Single-Symbol LLR Variation to Accelerate LDPC Decoding for 3-D nand Flash Memory.
items.abstract: Low-density parity-check (LDPC) codes have been widely adopted to guarantee data reliability in 3-D NAND flash memory. However, the iterative LDPC decoding algorithm leads to high-decoding latency due to the iterative message transfer mechanism. Using a field-programmable gate array (FPGA) testbed, we first present the binary channel in NAND flash and analyze the single-symbol log-likelihood ratio (LLR) variation with the decoding iterations. Subsequently, we investigate the raw bit error ratio (RBER) characteristics of intrapage frames. To reduce the number of iterative decoding, we propose a frame feedback information aware decoding algorithm (FFIA-DA), combined with the single-symbol LLR variation and the similar error characteristics among intrapage frames. The proposed method uses the decoding feedback information of one frame to decrease the number of decoding iterations of other frames with similar RBER. Experiments show that the proposed approach can improve the decoding performance of LDPC and speed up decoding convergence.
items.abstract_zh: 低密度奇偶校验（LDPC）码已被广泛采用来保证 3D NAND 闪存中的数据可靠性。然而，迭代LDPC解码算法由于迭代消息传输机制导致较高的解码延迟。使用现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 测试台，我们首先呈现 NAND 闪存中的二进制通道，并分析单符号对数似然比 (LLR) 随着解码迭代的变化。随后，我们研究了页内帧的原始误码率 (RBER) 特性。为了减少迭代解码次数，结合单符号LLR变化和页内帧之间的相似错误特征，我们提出了一种帧反馈信息感知解码算法（FFIA-DA）。该方法利用一帧的解码反馈信息来减少具有相似RBER的其他帧的解码迭代次数。实验表明，该方法可以提高LDPC的译码性能，加快译码收敛速度。

items.title: A Recursion and Lock Free GPU-Based Logic Rewriting Framework Exploiting Both Intranode and Internode Parallelism.
items.abstract: Logic rewriting is an effective but time-consuming technique to optimize the multilevel logic network by rewriting subnetworks of the input network with other logic equivalent structures. However, contemporary multithread rewriting algorithms either fail to parallelize the subprocedures of rewriting for individual nodes (intranode parallelism) or require locks to ensure the mutual exclusive among the scheduled nodes that are rewritten concurrently (internode parallelism), hence inevitably decreasing the degrees of parallelism and the scalability. This article proposes a novel GPU-based logic rewriting acceleration framework to address the mentioned issues in two phases. First, to exploit the intranode parallelism, we propose recursion-free algorithms that parallelize subprocedures of rewriting, which was hard to achieve due to the highly recursive nature of original rewriting algorithms. Second, to exploit the internode parallelism, we propose a work scheduler that can schedule mutually exclusive nodes and a GPU-friendly data structure that can support efficient concurrent operations. The new work scheduler and data structure allow simultaneously processing plenty of nodes without using locks. Experimental results show that our method can achieve on average 3.81× speedup, compared to the state-of-the-art GPU-parallel method with the same quality of results.
items.abstract_zh: 逻辑重写是一种有效但耗时的技术，通过用其他逻辑等效结构重写输入网络的子网络来优化多级逻辑网络。然而，当代的多线程重写算法要么无法将单个节点的重写子过程并行化（节点内并行性），要么需要锁来保证并发重写的调度节点之间的互斥性（节点间并行性），因此不可避免地降低了并行度和可扩展性。本文提出了一种新颖的基于GPU的逻辑重写加速框架，分两个阶段解决上述问题。首先，为了利用节点内并行性，我们提出了将重写子过程并行化的无递归算法，由于原始重写算法的高度递归性质，这是很难实现的。其次，为了利用节点间并行性，我们提出了一个可以调度互斥节点的工作调度程序和一个可以支持高效并发操作的 GPU 友好的数据结构。新的工作调度程序和数据结构允许在不使用锁的情况下同时处理大量节点。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法平均可以实现 3.81× 加速GPU 并行方法具有相同质量的结果。

items.title: Efficient FPGA-Based Sparse Matrix-Vector Multiplication With Data Reuse-Aware Compression.
items.abstract: Sparse matrix–vector multiplication (SpMV) on FPGAs has gained much attention. The performance of SpMV is mainly determined by the number of multiplications between nonzero matrix elements and the corresponding vector values per cycle. On the one side, the off-chip memory bandwidth limits the number of nonzero matrix elements transferred from the off-chip DDR to the FPGA chip per cycle. On the other side, the irregular vector access pattern poses challenges to fetch the corresponding vector values. Besides, the read-after-write (RAW) dependency in the accumulation process shall be solved to enable a fully pipelined design. In this work, we propose an efficient FPGA-based SpMV accelerator with data reuse-aware compression. The key observation is that repeated accesses to a vector value can be omitted by reusing the fetched data. Based on the observation, we propose a reordering algorithm to manually exploit the data reuse of fetched vector values. Further, we propose a novel compressed format called data reuse-aware compressed (DRC) to take full advantage of the data reuse and a fast format conversion algorithm to shorten the preprocessing time. Meanwhile, we propose an HLS-friendly accumulator to solve the RAW dependency. Finally, we implement and evaluate our proposed design on the Xilinx Zynq-UltraScale ZCU106 platform with a set of sparse matrices from the SuiteSparse matrix collection. Our proposed design achieves an average 1.18× performance speedup without the DRC format and an average 1.57× performance speedup with the DRC format w.r.t. the state-of-the-art work, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: FPGA 上的稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 引起了广泛关注。 SpMV的性能主要取决于每个周期非零矩阵元素与相应向量值之间的乘法次数。一方面，片外存储器带宽限制了每个周期从片外 DDR 传输到 FPGA 芯片的非零矩阵元素的数量。另一方面，不规则的向量访问模式给获取相应的向量值带来了挑战。此外，还应解决累积过程中的读后写（RAW）依赖性，以实现完全流水线设计。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 FPGA 的高效 SpMV 加速器，具有数据重用感知压缩功能。关键的观察是，通过重用所获取的数据可以省略对向量值的重复访问。根据观察，我们提出了一种重新排序算法来手动利用获取的向量值的数据重用。此外，我们提出了一种称为数据重用感知压缩（DRC）的新型压缩格式，以充分利用数据重用和快速格式转换算法来缩短预处理时间。同时，我们提出了一个 HLS 友好的累加器来解决 RAW 依赖性。最后，我们使用 SuiteSparse 矩阵集合中的一组稀疏矩阵在 Xilinx Zynq-UltraScale ZCU106 平台上实现并评估我们提出的设计。我们提出的设计在没有 DRC 格式和平均 1.18× 性能加速xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> $1.57\times $ 使用 DRC 格式提高性能。分别是最先进的工作。

items.title: A Deterministic Embedded End-System Tightly Coupled With TSN Schedule.
items.abstract: Distributed real-time systems (DRTSs) composed of many embedded end-systems have been widely adopted in the industrial fields. Time-sensitive networking (TSN), as a promising communication infrastructure for DRTS, has shown great potential in industry and academia. TSN assumes that an end-system can release critical tasks to process critical packets strictly according to the prescheduled time. Unfortunately, two factors currently damage this assumption: 1) the jitter caused by system architecture during task release, task execution, and packet transmission; and 2) a TSN schedule result may exceed the execution capability of the end-system and cause conflicts. This article proposed deterministic chip (DetChip), a system-on-chip capable of deterministically implementing the TSN schedule result. DetChip supports time-triggered task release, time-predictable task execution and precise network transmission. Based on DetChip, this article first formalizes the execution capability of the end-system as end-system constraints (ECs). Existing TSN scheduling algorithms integrating ECs can solve conflicts by co-scheduling end-systems and the TSN network. Compared with previous works, DetChip only introduces few clock cycles jitter for critical task execution according to the TSN schedule result. The proposed ECs obtain 2× – 8× more conflict-free solutions for advanced scheduling algorithms with a linear increase in time overhead. Compared with the general end-system, DetChip can reduce 6× – 20× processing jitter to achieve better clock synchronization.
items.abstract_zh: 由许多嵌入式终端系统组成的分布式实时系统（DRTS）已在工业领域得到广泛采用。时间敏感网络（TSN）作为一种有前景的 DRTS 通信基础设施，在工业界和学术界表现出了巨大的潜力。 TSN 假设端系统可以严格按照预先安排的时间释放关键任务来处理关键数据包。不幸的是，目前有两个因素破坏了这一假设：1）任务释放、任务执行和数据包传输过程中系统架构引起的抖动； 2) TSN调度结果可能超出终端系统的执行能力并导致冲突。本文提出了确定性芯片（DetChip），一种能够确定性地实现 TSN 调度结果的片上系统。 DetChip支持时间触发的任务发布、时间可预测的任务执行和精确的网络传输。基于DetChip，本文首先将端系统的执行能力形式化为端系统约束（EC）。现有的集成EC的TSN调度算法可以通过共同调度终端系统和TSN网络来解决冲突。与之前的工作相比，DetChip 根据 TSN 调度结果只为关键任务的执行引入了很少的时钟周期抖动。提议的 EC 获得 2× – 8× 高级调度算法的更多无冲突解决方案，时间开销线性增加。与一般终端系统相比，DetChip可以减少 6× – 20× 处理抖动以实现更好的时钟同步。

items.title: Approximation-Aware Task Deployment on Heterogeneous Multicore Platforms With DVFS.
items.abstract: Heterogeneous (HE) multicore platforms, such as ARM big.LITTLE, are widely used to execute embedded applications under multiple and contradictory constraints, such as energy consumption and real-time (RT) execution. To fulfill these constraints and optimize system performance, application tasks should be efficiently mapped on multicore platforms. Embedded applications are usually tolerant to approximated results but acceptable quality of service (QoS). Modeling-embedded applications by using the elastic task model, namely, imprecise computation (IC) task model, can balance system QoS, energy consumption, and RT performance during task deployment. However, state-of-the-art approaches seldom consider the problem of IC task deployment on HE multicore platforms. They typically neglect task migration, which can improve the solutions due to its flexibility during the task deployment process. This article proposes a novel QoS-aware task deployment method to maximize system QoS under energy and RT constraints, where the frequency assignment (FA), task allocation (TA), scheduling, and migration are optimized simultaneously. The task deployment problem is formulated as mixed-integer nonlinear programming. Then, it is linearized to mixed-integer linear programming to find the optimal (OPT) solution. Furthermore, based on the problem structure and problem decomposition, we propose a novel heuristic (HEU) with low computational complexity. The subproblems regarding FA, TA, scheduling, and adjustment are considered and solved in sequence. Finally, the simulation results show that the proposed task deployment method improves the system QoS by 31.2% on average (up to 112.8%) compared to the state-of-the-art methods and the designed HEU achieves about 53.9% (on average) performance of the OPT solution with a negligible computing time.
items.abstract_zh: 异构 (HE) 多核平台，例如 ARM big.LITTLE，广泛用于在多重且相互矛盾的约束下执行嵌入式应用程序，例如能耗和实时 (RT) 执行。为了满足这些限制并优化系统性能，应用程序任务应该有效地映射到多核平台上。嵌入式应用程序通常可以容忍近似结果，但可以接受可接受的服务质量 (QoS)。使用弹性任务模型，即不精确计算（IC）任务模型对嵌入式应用进行建模，可以在任务部署过程中平衡系统QoS、能耗和RT性能。然而，最先进的方法很少考虑 HE 多核平台上的 IC 任务部署问题。他们通常会忽略任务迁移，而任务迁移由于其在任务部署过程中的灵活性而可以改进解决方案。本文提出了一种新颖的 QoS 感知任务部署方法，以在能量和 RT 约束下最大化系统 QoS，其中频率分配（FA）、任务分配（TA）、调度和迁移同时优化。任务部署问题被表述为混合整数非线性规划。然后，将其线性化为混合整数线性规划以找到最优（OPT）解决方案。此外，基于问题结构和问题分解，我们提出了一种计算复杂度较低的新颖启发式（HEU）。依次考虑并解决FA、TA、调度、调整等子问题。最后，仿真结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的任务部署方法将系统服务质量平均提高了 31.2%（高达 112.8%），并且设计的 HEU 在计算时间可忽略不计的情况下实现了 OPT 解决方案的约 53.9%（平均）性能。

items.title: Redundancy Attack: Breaking Logic Locking Through Oracleless Rationality Analysis.
items.abstract: During the last decade, logic locking has been proposed to protect integrated circuits against piracy and reverse engineering threats. Functional pruning attacks, such as the Boolean satisfiability (SAT) attack, have greatly challenged the security of logic locking techniques, yet they require access to an oracle and suffer from muted efficacy on inherently SAT-hard circuits. In this article, we present a novel oracleless attack on both XOR and MUX-based logic locking by analyzing the redundancy level deviation under different keys. Our fundamental insight is that incorrect keys would produce circuits that violate universally followed design principles, prominent among which stands the minimization of logic redundancy. We leverage the redundancy-level deviation produced by individual and pairs of key bits to recover key bit values and establish pairwise equivalence, leading to an efficient nearly linear time attack algorithm. We experimentally verify that the proposed attack quickly unveils more than half of the key bits with high accuracy on 21 ISCAS’85 and MCNC circuits locked with a variety of locking techniques. To fortify logic locking in the face of this successful redundancy attack, we supplement this article with a key gate insertion methodology that smooths the deviation in redundancy level. We achieve this goal by selecting key gates that exhibit pairwise dissociation among a set of individually secure locations, which effectively breaks down correlations in arbitrary sets of key gates and, thus, imposes a consistent redundancy level throughout the key space. Experimental results confirm the strong redundancy attack resilience of the proposed defense strategy.
items.abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，人们提出了逻辑锁定来保护集成电路免受盗版和逆向工程威胁。功能剪枝攻击，例如布尔可满足性 (SAT) 攻击，极大地挑战了逻辑锁定技术的安全性，但它们需要访问预言机，并且在固有的 SAT 硬电路上受到减弱的功效。在本文中，我们通过分析不同密钥下的冗余级别偏差，提出了一种针对基于 XOR 和 MUX 的逻辑锁定的新型无预言攻击。我们的基本见解是，不正确的密钥会产生违反普遍遵循的设计原则的电路，其中最突出的是逻辑冗余的最小化。我们利用单个和成对密钥位产生的冗余级偏差来恢复密钥位值并建立成对等价，从而产生高效的近线性时间攻击算法。我们通过实验验证了所提出的攻击在使用各种锁定技术锁定的 21 个 ISCAS’85 和 MCNC 电路上快速高精度地揭示了一半以上的密钥位。为了在面对这种成功的冗余攻击时强化逻辑锁定，我们用一种关键门插入方法来补充本文，该方法可以平滑冗余级别的偏差。我们通过选择在一组单独安全位置之间表现出成对解离的关键门来实现这一目标，这有效地打破了任意一组关键门中的相关性，从而在整个关键空间中施加了一致的冗余级别。实验结果证实了所提出的防御策略具有强大的冗余攻击能力。

items.title: PeF: Poisson's Equation-Based Large-Scale Fixed-Outline Floorplanning.
items.abstract: Floorplanning is the first stage of VLSI physical design. An effective floorplanning engine definitely has a positive impact on chip design speed, quality, and performance. In this article, we present a novel mathematical model to characterize nonoverlapping of modules, and propose a flat fixed-outline floorplanning algorithm based on the VLSI global placement approach using Poisson’s equation. The algorithm consists of global floorplanning and legalization phases. In global floorplanning, we redefine the potential energy of each module based on the novel mathematical model for characterizing nonoverlapping of modules and an analytical solution of Poisson’s equation. In this scheme, the widths of soft modules appear as variables in the energy function and can be optimized. Moreover, we design a fast approximate computation scheme for partial derivatives of the potential energy. In legalization, based on the defined horizontal and vertical constraint graphs, we eliminate overlaps between modules remained after global floorplanning, by modifying relative positions of modules. Experiments on the MCNC, GSRC, HB+, and ami49_x benchmarks show that, our algorithm improves the average wirelength by at least 2% and 5% on small and large-scale benchmarks with certain whitespace, respectively, compared to state-of-the-art floorplanners.
items.abstract_zh: 布局规划是VLSI物理设计的第一阶段。有效的布局规划引擎肯定会对芯片设计速度、质量和性能产生积极影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的数学模型来表征模块的不重叠，并提出了一种基于使用泊松方程的 VLSI 全局布局方法的平面固定轮廓布局规划算法。该算法由全局布局规划和合法化阶段组成。在全局布局规划中，我们基于表征模块不重叠的新颖数学模型和泊松方程的解析解重新定义了每个模块的势能。在该方案中，软模块的宽度作为能量函数中的变量出现并且可以被优化。此外，我们设计了势能偏导数的快速近似计算方案。在合法化中，基于定义的水平和垂直约束图，我们通过修改模块的相对位置来消除全局布局规划后剩余的模块之间的重叠。在 MCNC、GSRC、HB+ 和 ami49_x 基准上的实验表明，与最先进的布局规划器相比，我们的算法在具有一定空白的小型和大规​​模基准上分别将平均线长提高了至少 2% 和 5%。

items.title: REX-SC: Range-Extended Stochastic Computing Accumulation for Neural Network Acceleration.
items.abstract: Deep learning has grown in capability and size in recent years, prompting research on alternative computing methods to cope with the increased compute cost. Stochastic computing (SC) promises higher compute efficiency with its compact compute units, but accuracy issues have prevented wide adoption, and accuracy-improving techniques have sacrificed runtime or training performance. In this work, we propose extended range SC—Range-Extended SC Accumulation to deal with the accuracy issues of SC. By modifying the functionality of OR-based SC accumulation, we increase SC computation accuracy without sacrificing the performance benefits. Our approach achieves a 2× reduction in stream length for the same accuracy compared to SC with OR-based accumulation and an up to 3.6× improvement in energy compared to SC with binary addition. With proper modeling, our approach improves training performance for SC-based neural networks and makes training SC models practical for large datasets like ImageNet.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习的能力和规模不断增长，促进了对替代计算方法的研究，以应对计算成本的增加。随机计算（SC）以其紧凑的计算单元保证了更高的计算效率，但准确性问题阻碍了广泛采用，并且准确性改进技术牺牲了运行时或训练性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了扩展范围 SC——范围扩展 SC 累加来解决 SC 的准确性问题。通过修改基于 OR 的 SC 累加的功能，我们在不牺牲性能优势的情况下提高了 SC 计算精度。与基于 OR 的累加的 SC 相比，我们的方法在相同精度的情况下实现了 2× 流长度减少 与采用二元加法的 SC 相比，能量提高了 3.6 美元× 。通过适当的建模，我们的方法可以提高基于 SC 的神经网络的训练性能，并使训练 SC 模型适用于 ImageNet 等大型数据集。

items.title: A Memristor Crossbar-Based Lyapunov Equation Solver.
items.abstract: An analog memristor crossbar-based Lyapunov equation solver is proposed in this article. It is an extension of memristor crossbar linear equation solver, but taking into account of the regularity with Lyapunov equation in the organization of crossbar. Nonideal effects due to co-design with CMOS analog circuits are studied in detail. Verification using a Verilog-AMS tool is performed to justify that with proper scaling on the memristor conductance values and other circuit signals, the solution quality of Lyapunov matrix equation can be improved.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于模拟忆阻器交叉开关的李亚普诺夫方程求解器。它是忆阻器Crossbar线性方程求解器的扩展，但在Crossbar的组织中考虑了Lyapunov方程的规律性。详细研究了由于与 CMOS 模拟电路共同设计而产生的非理想效应。使用 Verilog-AMS 工具进行验证，证明通过对忆阻器电导值和其他电路信号进行适当缩放，可以提高 Lyapunov 矩阵方程的求解质量。

items.title: Criticality-Aware Negotiation-Driven Scrubbing Scheduling for Reliability Maximization in SRAM-Based FPGAs.
items.abstract: Memory scrubbing is a resource-efficient technique to ensure the high reliability of SRAM-based FPGAs by refreshing the configuration memory just before its execution. To maximize reliability, a scrubbing scheduling algorithm is expected to scrub as many tasks as possible. Unfortunately, contemporary scheduling algorithms either suboptimally handle scrubbing conflicts under bursty requests from multiple user tasks or discriminate against low-criticality tasks by giving them very low scrubbing opportunities. Besides, exploring the architectural support for scrubbing problems may bring considerable potential for reliability improvements. However, this direction of scheduling-architecture co-optimization has not been well studied so far. In this article, we propose a negotiation-based dynamic scrubbing framework, which addresses the above-mentioned issues in three phases: 1) we propose a negotiation-driven scrubbing scheduling algorithm, which temporarily allows and iteratively reduces the conflicts of scrubbing tasks in order to accommodate more scrubbing tasks to be scheduled; 2) we develop a logistic probability model to prevent scheduling starvation of a set of mix-criticality tasks by dynamically legalizing conflicting ones, considering both the criticality and schedulability of each task; and 3) we develop a dynamic voltage/frequency scaling-based multi-ICAPs allocation algorithm to co-optimize with FPGA architectural features for reliability maximization. Compared to the state-of-the-art, experimental results show that our work achieves up to 31.46% improvement in terms of reliability for contemporary SRAM-based FPGAs.
items.abstract_zh: 内存清理是一种资源节约型技术，可通过在执行前刷新配置内存来确保基于 SRAM 的 FPGA 的高可靠性。为了最大限度地提高可靠性，清理调度算法预计会清理尽可能多的任务。不幸的是，当代的调度算法要么在来自多个用户任务的突发请求下次佳地处理清理冲突，要么通过为低关键性任务提供非常低的清理机会来区分它们。此外，探索对清理问题的架构支持可能会带来相当大的可靠性改进潜力。然而，到目前为止，调度架构协同优化的这个方向还没有得到很好的研究。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于协商的动态清理框架，分三个阶段解决了上述问题：1）我们提出了一种协商驱动的清理调度算法，该算法暂时允许并迭代减少清理任务的冲突，以适应更多的清理任务被调度； 2）我们开发了一个逻辑概率模型，通过动态合法化冲突任务来防止一组混合关键任务的调度饥饿，同时考虑每个任务的关键性和可调度性； 3) 我们开发了一种基于动态电压/频率缩放的多 ICAP 分配算法，以与 FPGA 架构特性共同优化，以实现可靠性最大化。与最先进的技术相比，实验结果表明，我们的工作使当代基于 SRAM 的 FPGA 的可靠性提高了 31.46%。

items.title: Timing-Aware Qubit Mapping and Gate Scheduling Adapted to Neutral Atom Quantum Computing.
items.abstract: As a less developed but potential quantum technology, neutral atoms (NAs) can provide advantages, including higher qubit connectivity, longer-range interactions, and much more native multicontrol gates than superconductivity. Long-range interactions, however, prevent parallelism of interacting qubit pairs with their surrounding restriction zones. Therefore, the quantum program cannot be run directly on an NA quantum computer (NAQC) unless compiled. The recent compiling study of NAQC applies simple layer-by-layer scheduling and does not consider the difference in gate duration. To address the above issues, we focus on the qubit mapping and quantum gate scheduling (M&S) problem of quantum circuits to meet hardware constraints of superconductivity and even NAs. Our goal is to shorten the execution time to mitigate decoherence noise. We propose a block-game-like abstraction mechanism TETRIS which is an abstract model of the M&S problem and aware of the duration difference of gates and several other NA characteristics. Based on the abstraction, we propose a heuristic greedy algorithm (HGA) to solve the M&S problem efficiently. To further speed up the execution of the circuit, we embed HGA into a Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) framework to solve the M&S problem, which consumes more compiling time but achieves a better result. Comparing our MCTS algorithm with the only recent M&S algorithm for NAQC, the average speedup ratio is 1.75× for several quantum circuits collected from RevLib, and 1.18× for circuits from Qiskit Lib.
items.abstract_zh: 作为一种欠发达但有潜力的量子技术，中性原子（NA）可以提供优势，包括更高的量子位连接性、更远距离的相互作用以及比超导更多的原生多控制门。然而，长程相互作用阻止了相互作用的量子位对与其周围限制区域的并行性。因此，量子程序除非经过编译，否则不能直接在NA量子计算机（NAQC）上运行。最近的NAQC编译研究采用简单的逐层调度，没有考虑门持续时间的差异。为了解决上述问题，我们重点研究量子电路的量子位映射和量子门调度（M＆S）问题，以满足超导甚至NA的硬件限制。我们的目标是缩短执行时间以减轻退相干噪声。我们提出了一种类似块游戏的抽象机制 TETRIS，它是 M&S 问题的抽象模型，并了解门的持续时间差异和其他几个 NA 特征。基于抽象，我们提出了一种启发式贪婪算法（HGA）来有效地解决M＆S问题。为了进一步加快电路的执行速度，我们将HGA嵌入到蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）框架中来解决M&S问题，这消耗了更多的编译时间，但取得了更好的结果。将我们的 MCTS 算法与最近唯一用于 NAQC 的 M&S 算法进行比较，平均加速比为 1.75× 用于从 RevLib 收集的多个量子电路，以及 1.18× 来自 Qiskit Lib 的电路。

items.title: Integrated Test Module Design for Microfluidic Large-Scale Integration.
items.abstract: Microfluidic large-scale integration (mLSI) is a promising lab-on-a-chip platform for high-throughput bio-applications. Due to the high integration scale and the small feature size, control channels on mLSI chips are prone to blockage and leakage defects, which may lead to faulty behavior of valves and erroneous experimental results. Thus, mLSI chips need to be tested before usage. Current mLSI-tests are mostly performed in a straightforward way by testing each valve individually, which is very time consuming and error prone. As the integration scale of mLSI chips keeps increasing, there is a pressing demand for more efficient test approaches. This work proposes the first built-in-self-test (BIST) method for mLSI with an integrated test module design. Instead of testing individual valves, the proposed method directly tests the control channels and thus greatly improves the test efficiency. Only (n/2) and \lceil \log _2(n+1)\rceil test operations are required to test the blockage and leakage defects, respectively, of n control channels. The proposed test module consumes moderate area overhead and the test method is easy to operate. Neither specialized software nor external pressure sensors are required for carrying out the tests. Experiments show that our test approach is sensitive enough to detect defects that have a feature size as small as 10 mu \textm and that are several centimeters away from the test module.
items.abstract_zh: 微流控大规模集成（mLSI）是一种有前景的芯片实验室平台，适用于高通量生物应用。由于高集成度和小特征尺寸，mLSI芯片上的控制通道容易出现堵塞和泄漏缺陷，这可能导致阀门的故障行为和错误的实验结果。因此，mLSI芯片在使用前需要进行测试。当前的 mLSI 测试大多通过单独测试每个阀门以直接的方式进行，这非常耗时且容易出错。随着mLSI芯片集成规模的不断增加，迫切需要更高效的测试方法。这项工作提出了第一个具有集成测试模块设计的 mLSI 内置自测试 (BI​​ST) 方法。该方法不再测试单个阀门，而是直接测试控制通道，从而大大提高了测试效率。仅 (n/2) 和 \lceil \log _2(n+1)\rceil 分别需要测试以下的堵塞和泄漏缺陷 n 控制通道。所提出的测试模块消耗适中的面积开销并且测试方法易于操作。进行测试不需要专门的软件或外部压力传感器。实验表明，我们的测试方法足够灵敏，可以检测特征尺寸小至 10 的缺陷 mu \textm 距离测试模块几厘米。

items.title: A New Compact Model for Third-Order Memristive Neuron With Box-Shaped Hysteresis and Dynamics Analysis.
items.abstract: This article proposes a new compact model and presents a circuit-theoretical analysis for a third-order memristive neuromorphic element fabricated by Kumar et al. The proposed model mainly consists of a box-shaped resistor model and a simplified piecewise-linear memristor model. Since the dynamic behavior of the box-shaped hysteresis in the quasistatic current–voltage curve is mostly unexplored, we first extract the box-shaped resistor model and construct its oscillators. The coordinate system shifting method and dynamic route analysis method are used to reveal the operating mechanism of boxshaped resistor-based oscillators. Both the theoretical analysis and simulation verification indicate that the box-shaped hysteresis characteristic facilitates the generation of neuromorphic action potentials. The proposed new compact model not only captures quasi-static characteristics but also includes dynamic behaviors, such as action potential, periodic spiking, and periodic bursting. The influences of the model parameters are further investigated to reveal the mechanism of the neuromorphic behaviors in the box-shaped hysteresis and positive differential resistance regions. Simulation results manifest the feasibility of the proposed model and the correctness of the presented analysis methods, which pave the way to the optimized design of memristive devices and the research of neuromorphic dynamics.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的紧凑模型，并对 Kumar 等人制造的三阶忆阻神经形态元件进行了电路理论分析。所提出的模型主要由盒形电阻器模型和简化的分段线性忆阻器模型组成。由于准静态电流-电压曲线中盒状磁滞的动态行为大多尚未探索，因此我们首先提取盒状电阻模型并构建其振荡器。采用坐标系平移方法和动态路径分析方法揭示了箱形电阻振荡器的工作机制。理论分析和仿真验证都表明，盒状滞后特性有利于神经形态动作电位的产生。所提出的新紧凑模型不仅捕获准静态特征，还包括动态行为，例如动作电位、周期性尖峰和周期性爆发。进一步研究模型参数的影响，以揭示盒状磁滞和正微分电阻区域中神经形态行为的机制。仿真结果证明了所提模型的可行性和分析方法的正确性，为忆阻器件的优化设计和神经形态动力学的研究奠定了基础。

items.title: DREAMPlace 4.0: Timing-Driven Placement With Momentum-Based Net Weighting and Lagrangian-Based Refinement.
items.abstract: Optimizing timing is critical to the design closure of integrated circuits (ICs). However, most existing algorithms for circuit placement focus on the optimization of wirelength instead of timing metrics. This article presents a timing-driven placement framework. It consists of a global placement stage based on net weighting with momentum, and a detailed placement stage based on the Lagrangian multipliers. By improving the preconditioners and timing engines to facilitate net weighting and discrete local search, we have achieved superior timing improvement on benchmarks from ICCAD 2015 contest, including worst negative slack (WNS) and total negative slack (TNS).
items.abstract_zh: 优化时序对于集成电路 (IC) 的设计收敛至关重要。然而，大多数现有的电路布局算法都侧重于线长的优化而不是时序指标。本文介绍了一个时序驱动的放置框架。它由基于动量净权重的全局布局阶段和基于拉格朗日乘数的详细布局阶段组成。通过改进预处理器和时序引擎以促进净加权和离散本地搜索，我们在 ICCAD 2015 竞赛的基准上实现了卓越的时序改进，包括最差负松弛 (WNS) 和总负松弛 (TNS)。

items.title: RESCUE: Resilient, Scalable, High-Corruption, Compact-Key-Set Locking Framework.
items.abstract: Logic locking has gained traction for protecting the intellectual property (IP) of integrated circuits (ICs) from untrusted foundries, test facilities, and end users. A working chip or an oracle is a significant resource for an attacker to retrieve the secret locking key. Recently, a radically different logic locking shield (DisORC) was proposed to safeguard an IC against oracle-guided attacks such as satisfiability (SAT)-based attacks which rely on scan access. This scheme was shown to be resilient on larger circuits with large sequential depths; however, it fails to protect smaller circuits, such as specialized controllers, even for large key sizes as attacks can succeed even without scan access. A truly random logic locking (TRLL) technique was proposed to thwart learning-based attacks, by making random decisions on absorbing inverters in the design into key-gates. However, small design blocks may not contain enough inverters to replace, and thereby when locked with TRLL, they may not resist learning-based attacks. Further, for large key sizes, high corruption schemes, such as TRLL, produce multiple correct keys, simplifying the key recovery for an attacker. In this work, we propose a scalable, learning-resilient, high-corruption technique to protect even small design blocks from all known oracle-less and oracle-guided attacks all the while returning only a few correct keys. Our technique 1) randomly generates enough inversions in the design to provably thwart learning-based attacks; 2) strategically inserts key-gates to return only a few correct keys and obtain high output corruption; and 3) heuristically selects key-gate locations to improve resilience against sequential SAT-based attacks. We regress our technique on 14 representative ISCAS-89 and ITC-99 benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh: 逻辑锁定在保护集成电路 (IC) 的知识产权 (IP) 免受不受信任的代工厂、测试设施和最终用户的侵害方面受到了广泛关注。工作芯片或预言机是攻击者检索秘密锁定密钥的重要资源。最近，有人提出了一种完全不同的逻辑锁定屏蔽 (DisORC)，以保护 IC 免受预言机引导的攻击，例如依赖于扫描访问的基于可满足性 (SAT) 的攻击。该方案被证明在具有大顺序深度的较大电路上具有弹性；然而，它无法保护较小的电路，例如专用控制器，即使对于大密钥大小也是如此，因为即使没有扫描访问，攻击也可能成功。提出了一种真正的随机逻辑锁定（TRLL）技术，通过随机决策将设计中的反相器吸收到关键门中来阻止基于学习的攻击。然而，小型设计模块可能不包含足够的逆变器来替换，因此当使用 TRLL 锁定时，它们可能无法抵抗基于学习的攻击。此外，对于大密钥大小，高损坏方案（例如 TRLL）会生成多个正确密钥，从而简化了攻击者的密钥恢复。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种可扩展、具有学习弹性、高破坏性的技术，可以保护甚至很小的设计模块免受所有已知的无预言机和预言机引导的攻击，同时只返回一些正确的密钥。我们的技术 1) 在设计中随机生成足够的反转，以证明可以阻止基于学习的攻击； 2）策略性地插入密钥门以仅返回几个正确的密钥并获得高输出损坏； 3) 启发式地选择关键门位置以提高针对基于 SAT 的连续攻击的弹性。我们在 14 个代表性 ISCAS-89 和 ITC-99 基准测试中回归我们的技术。

items.title: Adaptive Management With Request Granularity for DRAM Cache Inside nand-Based SSDs.
items.abstract: Most flash-based solid-state drives (SSDs) adopt an onboard dynamic random access memory (DRAM) to buffer hot write data. Then, the write or overwrite operations can be absorbed by the DRAM cache, given that there is sufficient locality in the applications’ I/O access pattern, to consequently avoid flushing the write data onto underlying SSD cells. After analyzing typical real-world workloads over SSDs, we observed that the buffered data of small-size requests are more likely to be reaccessed than those of large write requests. To efficiently utilize the limited space of DRAM cache, this article proposes an adaptive request granularity-based cache management scheme for SSDs. First, we introduce a request block corresponding to a write request, as the cache management granularity, and propose a dynamic manner for classifying small and large request blocks. Next, we design three-level linked lists for supporting different routines of upgradation for small and large request blocks, once their data have been hit in the cache. Finally, we present a scheme of evicting the request blocks having the minimum cost in cache replacement, by taking both factors of access hotness and time discounting into account. Experimental results show that our proposal can yield improvements on cache hits and the overall I/O latency by 21.8 % and 14.7 % on average, compared to state-of-the-art cache management schemes inside SSDs.
items.abstract_zh: 大多数基于闪存的固态硬盘 (SSD) 采用板载动态随机存取存储器 (DRAM) 来缓冲热写入数据。然后，鉴于应用程序的 I/O 访问模式中有足够的局部性，写入或覆盖操作可以由 DRAM 缓存吸收，从而避免将写入数据刷新到底层 SSD 单元上。在分析 SSD 上的典型实际工作负载后，我们发现小尺寸请求的缓冲数据比大写请求的缓冲数据更有可能被重新访问。为了有效利用有限的 DRAM 缓存空间，本文提出了一种基于自适应请求粒度的 SSD 缓存管理方案。首先，我们引入与写入请求相对应的请求块作为缓存管理粒度，并提出一种对小请求块和大请求块进行分类的动态方式。接下来，我们设计三级链表，用于支持小型和大型请求块的不同升级例程，一旦它们的数据已命中缓存。最后，我们提出了一种考虑访问热度和时间折扣因素的驱逐缓存替换成本最小的请求块的方案。实验结果表明，我们的建议可以将缓存命中率和整体 I/O 延迟提高 21.8 % 和 平均为 14.7 %。

items.title: QANS: Toward Quantized Neural Network Adversarial Noise Suppression.
items.abstract: Neural network quantization techniques play an important role in efficiently deploying deep learning models on the hardware with limited computing and storage resources. Numerous applications of this technology, such as autopilot, necessitate not just efficiency but also robustness. Research on the robustness of quantized networks against adversarial attacks is becoming one of the major points of interest. In this work, we rethink the impact of quantization on adversarial attacks and explore the boundary of the robustness of quantized neural networks. This study reveals that activation quantization can be used as a defense to weaken adversarial noise, but the robustness of quantized models is still limited by the amplification effect of network errors, including quantization errors and adversarial noise. To address this problem, we propose the quantization adversarial noise suppression (QANS) method that employs a Gaussian kernel regularization constraint to stabilize the model by restricting the perturbation error within two levels of tolerance. Extensive experiments are conducted with Wide ResNet and VGG-16 models on CIFAR-10 and street view house number datasets under different attack methods, including several white-box and black-box attacks. Experimental results show the proposed method achieves superior robustness to prior works.
items.abstract_zh: 神经网络量化技术在计算和存储资源有限的硬件上高效部署深度学习模型方面发挥着重要作用。该技术的许多应用（例如自动驾驶仪）不仅需要效率，还需要稳健性。关于量化网络抵御对抗性攻击的鲁棒性的研究正在成为主要关注点之一。在这项工作中，我们重新思考量化对对抗性攻击的影响，并探索量化神经网络鲁棒性的边界。这项研究表明，激活量化可以作为削弱对抗性噪声的防御手段，但量化模型的鲁棒性仍然受到网络误差（包括量化误差和对抗性噪声）放大效应的限制。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了量化对抗性噪声抑制（QANS）方法，该方法采用高斯核正则化约束，通过将扰动误差限制在两个容差水平内来稳定模型。在不同的攻击方法（包括多种白盒和黑盒攻击）下，使用 Wide ResNet 和 VGG-16 模型在 CIFAR-10 和街景门牌号数据集上进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，所提出的方法比先前的工作具有更好的鲁棒性。

items.title: GAMER: GPU-Accelerated Maze Routing.
items.abstract: Maze routing is usually the most time-consuming step in global routing and detailed routing. A commonly used maze routing method is to start from one pin and iteratively connect the current route to the closest unconnected pin. This method reduces the maze routing problem to multiple multisource–multidestination shortest path problems. The shortest path problem in VLSI routing has: 1) rectilinear routing directions and 2) preferably small via usage. By utilizing these two characteristics, we propose a novel parallel algorithm called GAMER to accelerate the multisource–multidestination shortest path problem for VLSI routing. GAMER decomposes the shortest path search into alternating vertical and horizontal sweep operations, and two parallel algorithms are proposed to accelerate a sweep operation from O(n^2) to O(\log _2n) on a grid graph of n× n . Several techniques of applying GAMER on irregular routing regions are also introduced. Experiments are conducted by integrating GAMER into the state-of-the-art academic global router CUGR. CUGR adopts a two-level maze routing scheme, including coarse-grained routing and fine-grained routing, and they can be accelerated by 19.85× and 2.59× , respectively, with GAMER, achieving an overall speedup of 2.7× without quality degradation.
items.abstract_zh: 迷宫布线通常是全局布线和详细布线中最耗时的步骤。一种常用的迷宫路由方法是从一个引脚开始，迭代地将当前路由连接到最近的未连接引脚。该方法将迷宫路由问题简化为多个多源-多目的地最短路径问题。 VLSI 布线中的最短路径问题具有：1) 直线布线方向和 2) 最好使用较小的过孔。通过利用这两个特性，我们提出了一种称为 GAMER 的新型并行算法来加速 VLSI 路由的多源-多目的地最短路径问题。 GAMER 将最短路径搜索分解为交替的垂直和水平 sweep 操作，并提出了两种并行算法来加速 sweep 来自 O(n^2) 到 O(\log _2n) 在 n× n 。还介绍了在不规则布线区域应用GAMER的几种技术。通过将 GAMER 集成到最先进的学术全局路由器 CUGR 中进行实验。 CUGR采用两级迷宫路由方案，包括粗粒度路由和细粒度路由，可以通过 19.85× $ 加速 和 2.59× 分别与 GAMER 一起使用，实现 2.7× 整体加速，且质量没有下降。

items.title: HL-Pow: Learning-Assisted Pre-RTL Power Modeling and Optimization for FPGA HLS.
items.abstract: High-level synthesis (HLS) enables designers to customize hardware designs without the need for delving into low-level hardware details. However, it is still challenging to establish the correlation between the power consumption and hardware designs at an early design stage such as HLS. To overcome this problem, we introduce HL-Pow, a preregister-transfer-level (pre-RTL) power modeling, and optimization framework for FPGA HLS with the aid of up-to-date artificial intelligence techniques, which features high accuracy, speed, and generalization ability. HL-Pow is comprised of a power modeling framework and a design space exploration (DSE) engine. The power modeling framework encompasses: 1) a fully customized and light-weight feature construction flow to effectively identify and capture features that exert a major influence on power consumption and 2) a modeling flow that can build an accurate, fast, and transferable pre-RTL power estimator. With HL-Pow, the power evaluation process for hardware designs with FPGA HLS can be significantly expedited by circumventing the invocation of the time-consuming logic synthesis, physical design, and gate-level simulation steps. Furthermore, we describe a novel a priori knowledge-guided DSE algorithm which can combined with our power modeling approach to jointly achieve the design optimization for latency and power consumption with high efficiency and high quality. Experimental results demonstrate that HL-Pow produces accurate power prediction that is only 4.82% away from onboard power measurement, while offering a speedup of 24– 190× ( 84× on avg.). In addition, HL-Pow shows high generalization ability across applications with different characteristics and from various domains. Finally, the proposed DSE algorithm can reach a close approximation of the real Pareto frontier while only requiring traversing a small subset of design points in a broad design space.
items.abstract_zh: 高级综合 (HLS) 使设计人员能够定制硬件设计，而无需深入研究低级硬件细节。然而，在 HLS 等早期设计阶段建立功耗和硬件设计之间的相关性仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了HL-Pow，一种借助最新人工智能技术的FPGA HLS的预寄存器传输级（pre-RTL）功耗建模和优化框架，具有高精度、高速度和泛化能力。 HL-Pow 由功率建模框架和设计空间探索 (DSE) 引擎组成。功耗建模框架包括：1) 完全定制的轻量级特征构建流程，用于有效识别和捕获对功耗产生重大影响的特征；2) 建模流程，可以构建准确、快速且可转移的 RTL 前功耗估计器。借助 HL-Pow，可以避免调用耗时的逻辑综合、物理设计和门级仿真步骤，从而显着加快采用 FPGA HLS 的硬件设计的功耗评估过程。此外，我们描述了一种新颖的先验知识引导的 DSE 算法，该算法可以与我们的功耗建模方法相结合，共同实现高效率和高质量的延迟和功耗设计优化。实验结果表明，HL-Pow 可以生成准确的功率预测，与板载功率测量值仅相差 4.82%，同时提供 24 倍的加速 - 190× （ 84× 平均）。此外，HL-Pow 在具有不同特征和不同领域的应用程序中表现出高度的泛化能力。最后，所提出的 DSE 算法可以非常接近真实的 Pareto 前沿，同时只需要遍历广阔的设计空间中的一小部分设计点。

items.title: A Memristive Synapse Control Method to Generate Diversified Multistructure Chaotic Attractors.
items.abstract: Due to the synapse-like nonlinearity and memory characteristics, memristor is often used to construct memristive neural networks with complex dynamical behaviors. However, memristive neural networks with multistructure chaotic attractors have not been found yet. In this article, a novel method for designing multistructure chaotic attractors in memristive neural networks is proposed. By utilizing a multipiecewise memristive synapse control in a Hopfield neural network (HNN), various complex multistructure chaotic attractors can be produced. Theoretical analysis and numerical simulation demonstrate that multiple multistructure chaotic attractors with different topologies can be generated by conducting the memristive synapse-control in different synaptic coupling positions. Differing from traditional multiscroll attractors, the generated multistructure attractors contain multiple irregular shapes instead of simple scrolls. Meanwhile, the number of structures can be easily controlled with the memristor control parameters. Furthermore, we design a module-based analog memristive neural network circuit and the arbitrary number of multistructure attractors can be obtained by selecting corresponding control voltages. Finally, based on the memristive HNNs, a novel image encryption cryptosystem with a permutation-diffusion structure is designed and evaluated, exhibiting its excellent encryption performances, especially the extremely high key sensitivity.
items.abstract_zh: 由于忆阻器具有类突触的非线性和记忆特性，忆阻器常被用来构建具有复杂动态行为的忆阻神经网络。然而，具有多结构混沌吸引子的忆阻神经网络尚未被发现。在本文中，提出了一种在忆阻神经网络中设计多结构混沌吸引子的新方法。通过利用 Hopfield 神经网络 (HNN) 中的多分段忆阻突触控制，可以产生各种复杂的多结构混沌吸引子。理论分析和数值模拟表明，通过在不同的突触耦合位置进行忆阻突触控制，可以产生具有不同拓扑的多个多结构混沌吸引子。与传统的多卷轴吸引子不同，生成的多结构吸引子包含多个不规则形状而不是简单的卷轴。同时，结构的数量可以通过忆阻器控制参数轻松控制。此外，我们设计了基于模块的模拟忆阻神经网络电路，通过选择相应的控制电压可以获得任意数量的多结构吸引子。最后，基于忆阻HNN，设计并评估了一种新型的具有排列扩散结构的图像加密密码系统，展示了其优异的加密性能，特别是极高的密钥灵敏度。

items.title: A Triple-Memristor Hopfield Neural Network With Space Multistructure Attractors and Space Initial-Offset Behaviors.
items.abstract: Memristors have recently demonstrated great promise in constructing memristive neural networks with complex dynamics. This article proposes a memristive Hopfield neural network with three memristive coupling synaptic weights. The complex dynamical behaviors of the triple-memristor Hopfield neural network (TM-HNN), which have never been observed in previous Hopfield-type neural networks, include space multistructure chaotic attractors and space initial-offset coexisting behaviors. Bifurcation diagrams, Lyapunov exponents, phase portraits, Poincaré maps, and basins of attraction are used to reveal and examine the specific dynamics. Theoretical analysis and numerical simulation show that the number of space multistructure attractors can be adjusted by changing the control parameters of the memristors, and the position of space coexisting attractors can be changed by switching the initial states of the memristors. Extreme multistability emerges as a result of the TM-HNN’s unique dynamical behaviors, making it more suitable for applications based on chaos. Moreover, a digital hardware platform is developed and the space multistructure attractors as well as the space coexisting attractors are experimentally demonstrated. Finally, we design a pseudorandom number generator to explore the potential application of the proposed TM-HNN.
items.abstract_zh: 忆阻器最近在构建具有复杂动力学的忆阻神经网络方面表现出了巨大的前景。本文提出了一种具有三个忆阻耦合突触权重的忆阻 Hopfield 神经网络。三重忆阻器Hopfield神经网络（TM-HNN）的复杂动力学行为是以前的Hopfield型神经网络中从未观察到的，包括空间多结构混沌吸引子和空间初始偏移共存行为。分岔图、李亚普诺夫指数、相图、庞加莱图和吸引力盆地用于揭示和检查特定的动态。理论分析和数值模拟表明，通过改变忆阻器的控制参数可以调节空间多结构吸引子的数量，通过切换忆阻器的初始状态可以改变空间共存吸引子的位置。 TM-HNN 独特的动态行为导致了极端的多稳定性，使其更适合基于混沌的应用。此外，还开发了数字硬件平台，并对空间多结构吸引子和空间共存吸引子进行了实验演示。最后，我们设计了一个伪随机数生成器来探索所提出的 TM-HNN 的潜在应用。

items.title: TEMT: A Transient Electronic-Magnetic-Thermal-Coupled Simulation Framework for STT-MTJs.
items.abstract: Being a promising candidate for future nonvolatile memory and neuromorphic computing, spin-transfer-torque magnetic tunnel junction (STT-MTJ) devices are gaining substantial momentum in industrial adoption in recent years, calling for EDA support for higher modeling capabilities. However, the complex interplay of multiple physical mechanisms featured in MTJ devices imposes substantial challenges to their numerical modeling. In this work, we propose a fully coupled, transient electronic–magnetic–thermal (TEMT) modeling approach for STT-MTJ devices. Aiming to be the first principle and physically holistic, TEMT combines the atomistic nonequilibrium Green’s function (NEGF) model for tunneling currents, the Landau–Lifshitz–Gilbert–Slonczewski (LLGS) equation for magnetic dynamics and the heat conduction equation (HCE) for thermal dynamics in a self-consistent manner. To alleviate computational burden, we also devise an analytical approximation approach to reduce the number of NEGF solutions in the TEMT framework, which leads to over 15× speedup with a very mild accuracy loss. An in-depth investigation of STT-MTJ devices using the TEMT framework is conducted to demonstrate its benefits and performance.
items.abstract_zh: 作为未来非易失性存储器和神经形态计算的有前途的候选者，自旋转移矩磁隧道结 (STT-MTJ) 器件近年来在工业应用中获得了巨大的发展势头，需要 EDA 支持更高的建模功能。然而，MTJ 器件中多种物理机制的复杂相互作用给它们的数值建模带来了巨大的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种针对 STT-MTJ 器件的全耦合瞬态电子-磁-热 (TEMT) 建模方法。 TEMT 旨在成为第一原理和物理整体，以自洽的方式结合了隧道电流的原子非平衡格林函数 (NEGF) 模型、磁动力学的 Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert-Slonczewski (LLGS) 方程和热动力学的热传导方程 (HCE)。为了减轻计算负担，我们还设计了一种分析近似方法来减少 TEMT 框架中 NEGF 解的数量，这会导致超过 15× 加速，但精度损失非常轻微。对使用 TEMT 框架的 STT-MTJ 设备进行了深入研究，以证明其优点和性能。

items.title: Compiler of Reed-Solomon Codec for 400-Gb/s IEEE 802.3bs Standard.
items.abstract: Error correction is often indispensable in a modern digital communication system that transmits data at a very high speed. Recently published IEEE Std 802.3bs requires an astounding throughput of 400 Gb/s while using the Reed–Solomon code (RS-Code) to protect the integrity of the transmitted data. An RS-Codec supporting such a high throughput demands a significant silicon area. Improper decisions on the parameters of the parallel architecture could lead to unnecessarily high costs in the implementation. We have developed a compiler to solve this problem. First, the Codec satisfying IEEE Std 802.3bs using RS(544, 514) is parameterized, in a way that the throughput can be boosted on demand by setting some “configuration.” Second, an area- and power-efficient RS-Codec design satisfying a target throughput using a specific process can be inferred by our compiler in just minutes, and thereby easy process migration is supported. Experimental results using 28 and 90-nm CMOS processes are presented to demonstrate their effectiveness.
items.abstract_zh: 在以非常高的速度传输数据的现代数字通信系统中，纠错通常是必不可少的。最近发布的 IEEE Std 802.3bs 要求具有 400 Gb/s 的惊人吞吐量，同时使用里德-所罗门码 (RS-Code) 来保护传输数据的完整性。支持如此高吞吐量的 RS 编解码器需要大量的硅面积。对并行架构参数的不当决策可能会导致实施过程中不必要的高成本。我们开发了一个编译器来解决这个问题。首先，使用 RS(544, 514) 满足 IEEE Std 802.3bs 的编解码器被参数化，通过设置一些“配置”可以按需提高吞吐量。其次，我们的编译器可以在短短几分钟内推断出使用特定流程满足目标吞吐量的面积和功率高效的 RS-编解码器设计，从而支持轻松的流程迁移。使用 28 和 90 nm CMOS 工艺的实验结果证明了其有效性。

items.title: A Minimizing Energy Consumption Scheme for Real-Time Embedded System Based on Metaheuristic Optimization.
items.abstract: With the widespread application of real-time embedded systems (ESs), the contradiction between the energy consumption requirements of modern processors and the limited battery capacity becomes more obvious. Dynamic voltage scaling (DVS) has been proven to be one of the most effective technologies for energy management. However, recent studies have shown that the use of DVS leads to a significant increase in the transient fault rate of processors as the characteristic size of logic gates (or transistors) gets smaller and smaller. In this article, we consider the problem of assigning processing frequencies to a group of periodic real-time tasks so as to minimize the overall energy consumption under the constraints of time and reliability. First, under the DVS, we take the reliability of the ESs into consideration through the regularization terms and present the energy consumption optimization model based on the metaheuristic algorithms. Second, a novel algorithm for adaptive differential whale swarm optimization (ADWOA) is proposed according to the optimization requirements. Finally, the optimized data are saved on the chain through the storable feature of the blockchain for the necessary queries. It is worth noting that the on-chain data contains the intrinsic characteristics of the ES, which may give rise to the disclosure of processor privacy. Therefore, we come up with the differential privacy on-chain creating algorithm (DPCA) to protect the privacy of data on the chain. Experimental results show that ADWOA can minimize the energy consumption in real-time ES on the premise of ensuring system reliability and privacy.
items.abstract_zh: 随着实时嵌入式系统（ES）的广泛应用，现代处理器的能耗要求与有限的电池容量之间的矛盾变得更加明显。动态电压调节 (DVS) 已被证明是最有效的能源管理技术之一。然而，最近的研究表明，随着逻辑门（或晶体管）的特征尺寸变得越来越小，DVS的使用导致处理器的瞬态故障率显着增加。在本文中，我们考虑为一组周期性实时任务分配处理频率的问题，以便在时间和可靠性的约束下最小化总体能耗。首先，在DVS下，我们通过正则化项考虑ES的可靠性，并提出基于元启发式算法的能耗优化模型。其次，根据优化需求，提出了一种自适应差分鲸群优化（ADWOA）算法。最后，通过区块链的可存储特性将优化后的数据保存在链上，以供必要的查询。值得注意的是，链上数据包含了ES的固有特征，可能会导致处理器隐私的泄露。因此，我们提出了差分隐私链上创建算法（DPCA）来保护链上数据的隐私。实验结果表明，ADWOA能够在保证系统可靠性和隐私性的前提下，最大限度地降低实时ES的能耗。

items.title: FastGR: Global Routing on CPU-GPU With Heterogeneous Task Graph Scheduler.
items.abstract: Running time is a key metric across the standard physical design flow stages. However, with the rapid growth in design sizes, routing runtime has become the runtime bottleneck in the physical design flow. As a result, speeding routing becomes a critical and pressing task for IC design automation. Aside from the running time, we need to evaluate the quality of the global routing solution since a poor global routing engine degrades the solution performance after the entire routing stage. This work takes both of them into consideration. We propose a global routing framework with GPU-accelerated routing algorithms and a heterogeneous task graph scheduler, called FastGR, to accelerate the procedure of the modern global router and improve its effectiveness. Its runtime-oriented version \text FastGR^\text L achieves 2.489× speedup compared with the state-of-the-art global router. Furthermore, the GPU-accelerated L-shape pattern routing algorithm used in \text FastGR^\text L can contribute to 9.324× speedup over the sequential algorithm on CPU. Its quality-oriented version \text FastGR^\text H offers a 27.855% improvement of the number of shorts over the runtime-oriented version and still gets 1.970× faster than the most advanced global router.
items.abstract_zh: 运行时间是整个标准物理设计流程阶段的关键指标。然而，随着设计规模的快速增长，布线运行时间已成为物理设计流程中的运行瓶颈。因此，加速布线成为 IC 设计自动化的一项关键而紧迫的任务。除了运行时间之外，我们还需要评估全局路由解决方案的质量，因为较差的全局路由引擎会在整个路由阶段后降低解决方案的性能。这项工作将两者都考虑在内。我们提出了一个具有 GPU 加速路由算法和异构任务图调度程序（称为 FastGR）的全局路由框架，以加速现代全局路由器的过程并提高其有效性。其面向运行时的版本 \text FastGR^\text L 实现了 2.489× 与最先进的全局路由器相比，速度提升。此外， \text FastGR^\text L 中使用的 GPU 加速的 L 形图案路由算法与 CPU 上的顺序算法相比， 9.324× 加速。其面向质量的版本 \text FastGR^\text H 提供了 27.855% 的改进与面向运行时的版本相比，短路的数量仍然比最先进的全局路由器更快 1.970× 。

items.title: Equiprobability-Based Local Response Surface Method for High-Sigma Yield Estimation With Both High Accuracy and Efficiency.
items.abstract: With the ever-increasing transistor density and memory capability in integrated circuits, the high-sigma yield estimation has become a growing concern. This work presents an equiprobability-based local response surface (ELRS) method that can perform a high-sigma yield estimation with both high accuracy and efficiency. Demonstrating with 6T-SRAM, the proposed method exhibits more than ten times improvement in accuracy when compared with the state-of-the-art while maintaining the efficiency to the best record in the literature.
items.abstract_zh: 随着集成电路中晶体管密度和存储能力的不断增加，高西格玛良率估计已成为人们日益关注的问题。这项工作提出了一种基于等概率的局部响应面（ELRS）方法，可以高精度和高效地执行高西格玛产量估计。通过 6T-SRAM 的演示，所提出的方法与最先进的方法相比，精度提高了十倍以上，同时保持了文献中最佳记录的效率。

items.title: Hardware-Supported Patching of Security Bugs in Hardware IP Blocks.
items.abstract: To satisfy various design requirements and application needs, designers integrate multiple intellectual property blocks (IPs) to produce a system on chip (SoC). For improved survivability, designers should be able to patch the SoC to mitigate potential security issues arising from hardware IPs; for increased flexibility, we propose adding programmable hardware-based support for monitoring and bug mitigation. However, it is a challenge to decide how much additional cost a designer should expend up front to deal with unknown, future issues. We propose an approach that guides designers toward maximizing the benefits of adding “patchability” to various IPs in the system, given a target resource overhead. We frame the design problem as an integer quadratic program and show that our approach achieves superior patchability compared to the naïve and baseline approaches for a given cost limit. Experimental results show that when we set a cost limit of 2% field-programmable gate array adaptive logic module usage, our solution can generate a viable patching infrastructure with six patching blocks offering patches for seven different services in our case study.
items.abstract_zh: 为了满足各种设计要求和应用需求，设计人员集成了多个知识产权模块 (IP) 来生产片上系统 (SoC)。为了提高生存能力，设计人员应该能够对 SoC 进行修补，以减轻硬件 IP 引起的潜在安全问题；为了提高灵活性，我们建议添加基于可编程硬件的支持以进行监控和错误缓解。然而，决定设计师应该预先花费多少额外成本来处理未知的未来问题是一个挑战。我们提出了一种方法，指导设计人员在给定目标资源开销的情况下，最大化为系统中的各种 IP 添加“可修补性”的好处。我们将设计问题构建为整数二次规划，并表明，在给定成本限制下，与简单方法和基线方法相比，我们的方法实现了卓越的可修补性。实验结果表明，当我们将现场可编程门阵列自适应逻辑模块使用的成本限制设置为 2% 时，我们的解决方案可以生成一个可行的修补基础设施，其中有六个修补块，为我们的案例研究中的七种不同服务提供修补程序。

items.title: SoBS-X: Squeeze-Out Bit Sparsity for ReRAM-Crossbar-Based Neural Network Accelerator.
items.abstract: Resistive random-access-memory (ReRAM) crossbar is a promising technique for deep neural network (DNN) accelerators, thanks to its in-memory and in-situ analog computing abilities for vector–matrix multiplication-and-accumulations (VMMs). However, it is challenging for crossbar architecture to exploit the sparsity in DNNs. It is inevitably complex and costly to exploit fine-grained sparsity due to the limitation of the tightly coupled crossbar structure. As a countermeasure, we develop a novel ReRAM-based DNN accelerator, named sparse-multiplication-engine (SME), based on a hardware and software co-design framework. First, we orchestrate the bit-sparse pattern to increase the density of bit-sparsity based on existing quantization methods. Such quantized weights can be nicely generated using the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) optimization during the DNN fine-tuning, which can exactly enforce bit patterns in weights. Second, we propose a novel weight mapping mechanism to slice the bits of the weight across crossbars and splice the activation results in peripheral circuits. This mechanism can decouple the tightly coupled crossbar structure and cumulate the sparsity in the crossbar. Finally, a superior squeeze-out scheme empties the crossbars mapped with highly sparse nonzeros from the previous two steps. We design the SME architecture and discuss its use for other quantization methods and different ReRAM cell technologies. We further propose a workload grouping algorithm and a pipeline to achieve workload balance among crossbar-rows that concurrently execute multiply–accumulate operations to optimize the system latency. Putting all together, with the optimized model, compared with prior state-of-the-art designs, the SME shrinks the use of crossbars up to 8.7× and 2.1× using ResNet-50 and MobileNet-v2, respectively, and achieve average 3.1× speed up with no or little accuracy loss on ImageNet.
items.abstract_zh: 电阻式随机存取存储器 (ReRAM) 交叉开关对于深度神经网络 (DNN) 加速器来说是一种很有前途的技术，这要归功于其用于矢量矩阵乘法和累加 (VMM) 的内存内和原位模拟计算能力。然而，交叉开关架构利用 DNN 的稀疏性具有挑战性。由于紧密耦合的交叉结构的限制，利用细粒度稀疏性不可避免地是复杂且昂贵的。作为对策，我们基于硬件和软件协同设计框架，开发了一种新型的基于 ReRAM 的 DNN 加速器，名为稀疏乘法引擎（SME）。首先，我们在现有量化方法的基础上编排位稀疏模式以增加位稀疏密度。在 DNN 微调期间，可以使用乘法器交替方向法 (ADMM) 优化来很好地生成此类量化权重，这可以准确地强制权重中的位模式。其次，我们提出了一种新颖的权重映射机制，可以跨交叉开关分割权重位，并将激活结果拼接到外围电路中。该机制可以解耦紧密耦合的crossbar结构并累积crossbar中的稀疏性。最后，一种优越的挤出方案清空了前两个步骤中用高度稀疏非零映射的交叉开关。我们设计了 SME 架构并讨论了其在其他量化方法和不同 ReRAM 单元技术中的使用。我们进一步提出了一种工作负载分组算法和一个管道，以实现同时执行乘法累加操作的交叉行之间的工作负载平衡，以优化系统延迟。综上所述，通过优化模型，与之前最先进的设计相比，SME 将交叉开关的使用量减少至 8.7× 和 2.1× 使用 ResNet-50 和MobileNet-v2 分别实现了 3.1× 加速，在 ImageNet 上没有或几乎没有精度损失。

items.title: pGRASS-Solver: A Graph Spectral Sparsification-Based Parallel Iterative Solver for Large-Scale Power Grid Analysis.
items.abstract: With the increase in the complexity of VLSI chips, power grid analysis has become a challenging task, because linear equations of extremely large size need to be solved. Recent graph sparsification-based solvers have shown promising performance for power grid analysis. However, existing graph sparsification algorithms are implemented in serial computing, while factorization and backward/forward substitution of the sparsifier’s Laplacian matrix are hard to parallelize. On the other hand, partition-based iterative methods which are inherently parallel lack a direct control of the relative condition number of the preconditioner and consume more memory. In this work, we propose a novel parallel iterative solver called pGRASS-Solver. We first propose a practically efficient parallel graph sparsification algorithm. Then, the domain decomposition method (DDM) is utilized to solve the sparsifier’s Laplacian matrix. To further improve the efficiency, a variant of DDM which employs partial Cholesky factorization and Schur complement matrix sparsification is proposed. Thus, we obtain an efficient parallel preconditioner, which not only leads to fast convergence but also enjoys ease of parallelization. Numerous experiments are conducted to illustrate the superior efficiency of the proposed pGRASS-Solver for large-scale power grid analysis, showing an average 6.8× speedup over a recent parallel iterative solver (Wang et al. 2017). Moreover, it solves a real-world power grid matrix with 0.36 billion nodes and 8.7 billion nonzeros within 20 min on a 16-core machine, which is 10.9× faster than the best result of sequential graph sparsification-based solver (Liu et al. 2022).
items.abstract_zh: 随着VLSI芯片复杂性的增加，电网分析已成为一项具有挑战性的任务，因为需要求解极大尺寸的线性方程。最近基于图稀疏化的求解器在电网分析方面表现出了良好的性能。然而，现有的图稀疏化算法是在串行计算中实现的，而稀疏化器拉普拉斯矩阵的分解和后向/前向替换很难并行化。另一方面，基于分区的迭代方法本质上是并行的，缺乏对预处理器相对条件数的直接控制，并且消耗更多的内存。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的并行迭代求解器，称为 pGRASS-Solver。我们首先提出了一种实用有效的并行图稀疏算法。然后，利用域分解方法（DDM）来求解稀疏器的拉普拉斯矩阵。为了进一步提高效率，提出了一种采用部分 Cholesky 分解和 Schur 补矩阵稀疏化的 DDM 变体。因此，我们获得了一个高效的并行预处理器，它不仅可以实现快速收敛，而且易于并行化。进行了大量实验来说明所提出的 pGRASS-Solver 在大规模电网分析中的卓越效率，显示平均 6.8× 比最近的并行迭代求解器加速（Wang et al. 2017）。此外，它在 16 核机器上 20 分钟内求解了具有 3.6 亿个节点和 87 亿个非零值的现实电网矩阵，即 10.9× 比基于序列图稀疏化的求解器的最佳结果快（Liu et al. 2022）。

items.title: FeCrypto: Instruction Set Architecture for Cryptographic Algorithms Based on FeFET-Based In-Memory Computing.
items.abstract: Recently, computing-in-memory (CiM) becomes a promising technology for alleviating the memory wall bottleneck. CiM is suitable for data-intensive applications, especially, cryptographic algorithms. Most current cryptographic accelerators are specific to a single function. It is expensive to accelerate different cryptographic algorithms with different accelerators. In this work, we first introduce a CiM architecture FeMIC that supports multioperand CiM operations, by exploring advantages of state-of-the-art ferroelectric field-effect transistors. Based on that, we propose a novel instruction set together with an accelerator architecture named FeCrypto which supports the acceleration of various cryptographic algorithms. Evaluation results show that FeCrypto has better performance and energy efficiency than software implementations. The energy-delay product (EDP) of FeCrypto is 118.4× and 1.93× lower than that of the dedicated AES accelerator AIM that is built based on phase-change memories (PCMs) and magnetic random-access memories (MRAMs), respectively. EDP is reduced by 44.7× compared with PCM-based EIM, a recent AES accelerator. Compared with MRAM-based EIM, the EDP overhead of FeCrypto for supporting multiple functions is 23.2%.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，内存计算（CiM）成为缓解内存墙瓶颈的一项有前途的技术。 CiM 适用于数据密集型应用，尤其是加密算法。当前大多数加密加速器都特定于单一功能。使用不同的加速器来加速不同的加密算法的成本很高。在这项工作中，我们首先通过探索最先进的铁电场效应晶体管的优势，介绍支持多操作数 CiM 操作的 CiM 架构 FeMIC。在此基础上，我们提出了一种新颖的指令集以及名为 FeCrypto 的加速器架构，它支持各种密码算法的加速。评估结果表明，FeCrypto 比软件实现具有更好的性能和能源效率。 FeCrypto 的能量延迟积 (EDP) 为 118.4× 并且 1.93× 比基于相变存储器 (PCM) 构建的专用 AES 加速器 AIM 低分别是磁性随机存取存储器（MRAM）。与基于 PCM 的 EIM（一种最新的 AES 加速器）相比，EDP 减少了 44.7× 。与基于MRAM的EIM相比，FeCrypto支持多种功能的EDP开销为23.2%。

items.title: Cross Layer Design Using HW/SW Co-Design and HLS to Accelerate Chaining in Genomic Analysis.
items.abstract: DNA sequence analysis is a computationally intensive task. Minimap2 is a state-of-the-art software tool for third-generation sequence analysis workflow. Nearly 50% of Minimap2’s computation time is spent on what is known as the chaining step. In this article, the chaining step is accelerated using a novel heterogeneous computing system combining an Intel FPGA-based hardware accelerator and a CPU (using high-level synthesis for the FPGA and multithreaded software for the CPU). The system in this article is capable of handling large-realistic workloads and achieves up to \sim 1.35× performance improvement over the software solution running on an Intel CPU with SIMD intrinsics (Intel’s latest AVX-512) while consuming \sim 27\% less energy. When compared to the software solution running on the CPU without SIMD intrinsics, the system performs \sim 1.9× faster while consuming \sim 38\% less energy. Importantly, this work also ensures that the accuracy of the output generated is not compromised for the speed-up gained (this work only has an error rate of less than 10−6% compared to 26% in previous FPGA-based chaining step accelerator).
items.abstract_zh: DNA 序列分析是一项计算密集型任务。 Minimap2 是用于第三代序列分析工作流程的最先进的软件工具。 Minimap2 近 50% 的计算时间花费在所谓的链接步骤上。在本文中，使用一种新颖的异构计算系统加速了链接步骤，该系统结合了基于英特尔 FPGA 的硬件加速器和 CPU（使用 FPGA 的高级综合和 CPU 的多线程软件）。本文中的系统能够处理大型实际工作负载，并实现高达 \sim 1.35× 性能相对于在具有 SIMD 内在函数（英特尔最新的 AVX-512）的英特尔 CPU 上运行的软件解决方案的改进，同时消耗 \sim 27\% 更少的能量。与在没有 SIMD 内在函数的 CPU 上运行的软件解决方案相比，系统执行速度更快 \sim 1.9× 消耗 \sim 38\% 更少的能量。重要的是，这项工作还确保生成的输出的准确性不会因获得的加速而受到影响（这项工作的错误率仅低于 10−6%，而之前基于 FPGA 的链接步骤加速器的错误率为 26%）。

items.title: ADAR: Application-Specific Data Allocation and Reprogramming Optimization for 3-D TLC Flash Memory.
items.abstract: High bit-density flash memories, such as triple-level cell (TLC) and quad-level cell (QLC), have been widely used in flash memory-based storage systems, offering significantly high capacity. However, these high bit-density flash memories suffer from asymmetric access performance on the different pages that sharing the same physical cells. Meanwhile, 3-D flash memory adopts stacking technology to increase capacity and reduce cost per bit. The flash unit can be reprogrammed many times as long as the voltage increases. The reprogramming technology is also an effective solution for further increasing the 3-D flash capacity, allowing multiple program operations in an erase cycle. Considering the restrictions of reprogram operations, solid-state drives (SSDs) should capture the access pattern to perform more reprogramming operations to realize the joint optimization of read and write performance. In this work, we propose an application-specific data allocation and reprogramming technique named ADAR to enhance the read and write performance of 3-D TLC flash memory-based SSDs. The core idea is to allocate low-latency least significant bit (LSB) and central significant bit pages to frequently updated write data (termed hot write data) to improve the write performance, and reprogram the pages from high-latency pages (e.g., most significant bit page) to low-latency pages (e.g., LSB page mode) to enhance the read performance while initially storing frequently read data (termed hot read data) in high-latency pages. We explored data access patterns and designed an effective hotness identification method to present a new data allocation and reprogramming technique for 3-D TLC flash memory. Based on a modified 3-D TLC SSD simulator with typical workloads, our evaluation showed that our technique achieved 35.36% and 25.72% performance improvements in read and write latencies, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 高位密度闪存，例如三级单元（TLC）和四级单元（QLC），已广泛应用于基于闪存的存储系统，提供显着的高容量。然而，这些高位密度闪存在共享相同物理单元的不同页上存在不对称访问性能的问题。同时，3D闪存采用堆叠技术来增加容量并降低每比特成本。只要电压增加，闪光灯单元就可以多次重新编程。重编程技术也是进一步增加3D闪存容量的有效解决方案，允许在一个擦除周期内进行多次编程操作。考虑到重编程操作的限制，固态硬盘（SSD）应该捕获访问模式以执行更多的重编程操作，以实现读写性能的联合优化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 ADAR 的特定于应用程序的数据分配和重新编程技术，以增强基于 3D TLC 闪存的 SSD 的读写性能。其核心思想是将低延迟的最低有效位(LSB)和中央有效位页分配给频繁更新的写入数据(称为热写数据)以提高写入性能，并将页面从高延迟页(例如最高有效位页)重新编程到低延迟页(例如LSB页模式)以增强读取性能，同时最初将频繁读取的数据(称为热读数据)存储在高延迟页中。我们探索了数据访问模式并设计了一种有效的热度识别方法，为 3D TLC 闪存提供了一种新的数据分配和重新编程技术。基于具有典型工作负载的修改后的 3-D TLC SSD 模拟器，我们的评估表明，我们的技术在读取和写入延迟方面分别实现了 35.36% 和 25.72% 的性能改进。

items.title: Automatic Op-Amp Generation From Specification to Layout.
items.abstract: The operational amplifier is a key building block in analog systems. However, the design process of the operational amplifier is time consuming and heavily depends on engineers’ experiences. This article presents OPAMP-Generator, an analog operational amplifier generator, which automates the full design flow from user-defined specifications to GDSII layout without human intervention. OPAMP-Generator includes behavioral-level topology optimization, efficient sizing algorithm based on the classical g_m/I_d design methodology, and automated layout generation. The behavioral-level description of the opamp is represented by the directed acyclic graph (DAG) and a customized variational graph autoencoder is proposed to embed the discrete graph representation into a low-dimensional continuous space. The topology of the opamp can thus be optimized in the latent space, which greatly improves the optimization efficiency. The sizing algorithm based on g_m/I_d methodology can guarantee the quality of transistor-level circuit implementation. The constraints of the layouts can be naturally derived from the topology level, which facilities the automatic generation of layouts. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method can efficiently synthesize operational amplifiers with competitive performances compared to manual designs.
items.abstract_zh: 运算放大器是模拟系统中的关键构建模块。然而，运算放大器的设计过程非常耗时，并且很大程度上依赖于工程师的经验。本文介绍了 OPAMP-Generator，这是一款模拟运算放大器生成器，它可以自动执行从用户定义的规范到 GDSII 布局的整个设计流程，无需人工干预。 OPAMP-Generator 包括行为级拓扑优化、基于经典 g_m/I_d$ 的高效调整算法 设计方法和自动布局生成。运算放大器的行为级描述由有向无环图（DAG）表示，并提出了一种定制的变分图自动编码器，将离散图表示嵌入到低维连续空间中。因此可以在潜在空间中优化运算放大器的拓扑，这大大提高了优化效率。基于 g_m/I_d 方法论的尺寸调整算法可以保证晶体管级电路的质量实施。布局的约束可以自然地从拓扑级别导出，这有利于布局的自动生成。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以有效地合成运算放大器，与手动设计相比，其性能具有竞争力。

items.title: LightNAS: On Lightweight and Scalable Neural Architecture Search for Embedded Platforms.
items.abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS) is an emerging paradigm to automate the design of competitive deep neural networks (DNNs). In practice, DNNs are subject to strict latency constraints and any violation may lead to catastrophic consequences (e.g., autonomous vehicles). However, to obtain the architecture that strictly satisfies the required latency constraint, previous hardware-aware differentiable NAS methods have to repeat a plethora of search runs to tune relevant hyperparameters by trial and error, and as a result, the total design cost increases proportionally (empirically by ten times). To tackle this, we, in this article, introduce a lightweight and scalable hardware-aware NAS framework named LightNAS, which consists of two separate stages. In the first stage, we strive to search for the architecture that strictly satisfies the required latency constraint at the macro level in a differentiable manner, and more importantly, through a one-time search (i.e., you only search once). The architectures searched in the first stage are denoted as LightNets. After that, in the second stage, we introduce an efficient evolutionary scheme to further explore the micro-level channel configuration of each LightNet at low cost. To achieve this, we propose an effective yet computationally cheap proxy, namely, batchwise training estimation (BTE), as a plug-in complement to enable the channel-level exploration of LightNets on the fly such that the accuracy of LightNets can be improved without degrading the runtime latency on target hardware. Finally, extensive experiments are conducted on one popular embedded platform (i.e., Nvidia Jetson AGX Xavier) to demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach over previous state-of-the-art counterparts.
items.abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索 (NAS) 是一种新兴范例，用于自动设计竞争性深度神经网络 (DNN)。在实践中，DNN 受到严格的延迟限制，任何违规都可能导致灾难性后果（例如自动驾驶汽车）。然而，为了获得严格满足所需延迟约束的架构，以前的硬件感知可微分 NAS 方法必须重复大量搜索运行，通过反复试验来调整相关超参数，因此总设计成本成比例增加（经验上增加了十倍）。为了解决这个问题，我们在本文中介绍了一种轻量级且可扩展的硬件感知 NAS 框架，名为 LightNAS，它由两个独立的阶段组成。在第一阶段，我们努力以可微分的方式，更重要的是，通过一次性搜索（即只搜索一次）来搜索在宏观层面上严格满足所需延迟约束的架构。第一阶段搜索的架构表示为 LightNets。之后，在第二阶段，我们引入了一种高效的进化方案，以低成本进一步探索每个LightNet的微观通道配置。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种有效但计算成本低的代理，即批量训练估计（BTE），作为插件补充，以实现 LightNet 的通道级动态探索，从而可以在不降低目标硬件上的运行时延迟的情况下提高 LightNet 的准确性。最后，在一个流行的嵌入式平台（即 Nvidia Jetson AGX Xavier）上进行了广泛的实验，以证明所提出的方法相对于以前最先进的同行的有效性。

items.title: Variation Enhanced Attacks Against RRAM-Based Neuromorphic Computing System.
items.abstract: The RRAM-based neuromorphic computing system (NCS) has amassed explosive interests for its superior data processing capability and energy efficiency than traditional architectures, and thus being widely used in many data-centric applications. The reliability and security issues of the NCS, therefore, become an essential problem. In this article, we systematically investigated the adversarial threats to the RRAM-based NCS and observed that the RRAM hardware feature can be leveraged to strengthen the attack effect, which has not been granted sufficient attention by previous algorithmic attack methods. Thus, we proposed two types of hardware-aware attack methods with respect to different attack scenarios and objectives. The first is an adversarial attack, VADER, which perturbs the input samples to mislead the prediction of neural networks. The second is fault injection attack, EFI, which perturbs the network parameter space such that a specified sample will be classified to a target label, while maintaining the prediction accuracy on other samples. Both attack methods leverage the RRAM properties to improve the performance compared with the conventional attack methods. Experimental results show that our hardware-aware attack methods can achieve nearly 100% attack success rate with extremely low operational cost, while maintaining the attack stealthiness.
items.abstract_zh: 基于RRAM的神经拟态计算系统（NCS）因其比传统架构优越的数据处理能力和能源效率而引起了人们的广泛兴趣，因此被广泛应用于许多以数据为中心的应用中。因此，NCS的可靠性和安全性问题成为一个重要问题。在本文中，我们系统地研究了基于 RRAM 的 NCS 的对抗性威胁，并观察到可以利用 RRAM 硬件特性来增强攻击效果，而以前的算法攻击方法尚未对此给予足够的重视。因此，我们针对不同的攻击场景和目标提出了两种类型的硬件感知攻击方法。第一个是对抗性攻击 VADER，它扰乱输入样本以误导神经网络的预测。第二种是故障注入攻击，EFI，它扰乱网络参数空间，使得指定样本被分类到目标标签，同时保持对其他样本的预测精度。与传统攻击方法相比，这两种攻击方法都利用 RRAM 特性来提高性能。实验结果表明，我们的硬件感知攻击方法可以以极低的运营成本实现近100%的攻击成功率，同时保持攻击的隐秘性。

items.title: Access Characteristic Guided Partition for Nand Flash-Based High-Density SSDs.
items.abstract: nand flash-based solid-state drives (SSDs) are a kind of widely adopted storage. However, state-of-the-art works presented that the SSD always suffers from significant read performance degradation. One of the most critical reasons is access interference between read and write operations. This is because the read and write latency gaps are more pronounced for the latest nand flash in SSDs. In this article, an interference reduction scheme is proposed to improve performance. This is motivated by the observation from several server workloads, where read and write operations can be easily separated based on access characteristics. Considering that SSDs are always organized with many parallel units (PUs), the basic idea of this work is to partition the PUs of the SSD into different areas and place data in the corresponding area according to access characteristics. Then, the interference can be optimized by issuing read and write requests to the different areas. To realize the above design, several approaches are proposed: first, an access characteristic-based data placement and migration method is proposed for read and write request separation. Second, to further adapt the parallel requirement for different workloads, a workload-based partitioning scheme is proposed to determine the number of PUs for read and write areas. Finally, based on partitioned SSD, a hot-data driven wear-leveling method is further proposed to balance the wearing of PUs in read and write areas. Experimental results show that partitioned SSD can significantly improve the read performance and wear leveling of partitioned SSD can guarantee performance and lifetime.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 nand 闪存的固态硬盘 (SSD) 是一种广泛采用的存储。然而，最先进的研究表明 SSD 总是会遭受显着的读取性能下降。最关键的原因之一是读写操作之间的访问干扰。这是因为 SSD 中最新的 nand 闪存的读写延迟差距更加明显。在本文中，提出了一种干扰减少方案来提高性能。这是通过对多个服务器工作负载的观察得出的，其中可以根据访问特征轻松区分读取和写入操作。考虑到SSD总是由许多并行单元（PU）组织而成，这项工作的基本思想是将SSD的PU划分为不同的区域，并根据访问特性将数据放置在相应的区域中。然后，可以通过向不同区域发出读写请求来优化干扰。为了实现上述设计，提出了几种方法：首先，提出一种基于访问特征的数据放置和迁移方法，用于读写请求分离。其次，为了进一步适应不同工作负载的并行要求，提出了一种基于工作负载的分区方案来确定读写区域的PU数量。最后，基于分区SSD，进一步提出了热数据驱动的磨损均衡方法，以平衡读写区域PU的磨损。实验结果表明，分区SSD可以显着提高读取性能，并且分区SSD的磨损均衡可以保证性能和寿命。

items.title: Testing and Enhancing Adversarial Robustness of Hyperdimensional Computing.
items.abstract: Brain-inspired hyperdimensional computing (HDC), also known as vector symbolic architecture (VSA), is an emerging “non-von Neumann” computing scheme that imitates human brain functions to process information or perform learning tasks using abstract and high-dimensional patterns. Compared with deep neural networks (DNNs), HDC shows advantages, such as compact model size, energy efficiency, and few-shot learning. Despite of those advantages, one under-investigated area of HDC is the adversarial robustness; existing works have shown that HDC is vulnerable to adversarial attacks where attackers can add minor perturbations onto the original inputs to “fool” HDC models, producing wrong predictions. In this article, we systematically study the adversarial robustness of HDC by developing a systematic approach to test and enhance the robustness of HDC against adversarial attacks with two main components: 1) TestHD, which is a highly automated testing tool that can generate high-quality adversarial data for a given HDC model and 2) GuardHD, which utilizes the adversarial data generated by TestHD to enhance the adversarial robustness of HDC models. The core idea of TestHD is built on top of fuzz testing method. We customize the fuzzing approach by proposing a similarity-based coverage metric to guide TestHD to continuously mutate original inputs to generate new inputs that can trigger incorrect behaviors of HDC model. Thanks to the use of differential testing, TestHD does not require knowing the labels of the samples beforehand. For enhancing the adversarial robustness, we design, implement, and evaluate GuardHD to defend HDC models against adversarial data. The core idea of GuardHD is an adversarial detector which can be trained by TestHD-generated adversarial samples. During inference, once an adversarial sample is detected, GuardHD will override the prediction result with an “invalid” signal. We evaluate the proposed methods on four datasets and five adversarial attack scenarios with six adversarial generation strategies and two defense mechanisms, and compare the performance correspondingly. GuardHD is able to differentiate between benign and adversarial inputs with over 90% accuracy, which is up to 55% higher than adversarial training-based baselines. To the best of our knowledge, this article presents the first comprehensive effort in systematically testing and enhancing the robustness against adversarial data of this emerging brain-inspired computational model.
items.abstract_zh: 类脑超维计算（HDC），也称为矢量符号架构（VSA），是一种新兴的“非冯·诺依曼”计算方案，它模仿人脑功能，使用抽象和高维模式来处理信息或执行学习任务。与深度神经网络（DNN）相比，HDC 显示出模型尺寸紧凑、能源效率和少样本学习等优势。尽管有这些优势，HDC 的一个尚未得到充分研究的领域是对抗鲁棒性；现有的研究表明，HDC 很容易受到对抗性攻击，攻击者可以在原始输入上添加微小的扰动来“愚弄”HDC 模型，从而产生错误的预测。在本文中，我们系统地研究了 HDC 的对抗鲁棒性，通过开发一种系统方法来测试和增强 HDC 针对对抗攻击的鲁棒性，该方法包含两个主要组件：1）TestHD，这是一种高度自动化的测试工具，可以为给定的 HDC 模型生成高质量的对抗数据；2）GuardHD，它利用 TestHD 生成的对抗数据来增强 HDC 模型的对抗鲁棒性。 TestHD的核心思想是建立在模糊测试方法之上的。我们通过提出基于相似性的覆盖度量来定制模糊测试方法，以指导 TestHD 不断改变原始输入以生成可能触发 HDC 模型错误行为的新输入。由于使用差异测试，TestHD 不需要事先知道样品的标签。为了增强对抗性鲁棒性，我们设计、实现和评估 GuardHD 以保护 HDC 模型免受对抗性数据的影响。 GuardHD 的核心思想是一个对抗性检测器，可以通过 TestHD 生成的对抗性样本进行训练。在推理过程中，一旦检测到对抗性样本，GuardHD 就会用“无效”信号覆盖预测结果。我们在四个数据集和五种对抗性攻击场景、六种对抗性生成策略和两种防御机制上评估了所提出的方法，并比较了相应的性能。 GuardHD 能够区分良性输入和对抗性输入，准确率超过 90%，比基于对抗性训练的基线高出 55%。据我们所知，本文首次提出了系统测试和增强这种新兴的受大脑启发的计算模型对抗性数据鲁棒性的全面努力。

items.title: Tidal-Tree-Mem: Toward Read-Intensive Key-Value Stores With Tidal Structure Based on LSM-Tree.
items.abstract: The log-structured merge-tree (LSM-tree)-based key-value store has been widely adopted by many large-scale data storage applications for its excellent write performance. However, such write performance gains mainly come from scarifying read performance due to the leveled and log-structured intrinsic characteristics of the LSM-tree. Therefore, the critical challenge of the existing LSM-tree is how to improve the read efficiency by reducing read amplification. This article for the first time proposes Tidal-tree-Mem, a novel data structure where data flow inside the LSM-tree-like Tidal waves. First, a floating strategy is proposed to allow frequently accessed files at the bottom of the LSM-tree to move to higher positions, reducing read amplification. Second, a stretching strategy is proposed to vary the shape of the LSM-tree to adapt to workloads with different characteristics. To evaluate the performance of Tidal-tree-Mem, we conduct a series of experiments using standard benchmarks from YCSB. The experimental results show that Tidal-tree-Mem can effectively reduce read amplification and the overall latency by over 71.94% and 47.34%, respectively, compared with representative schemes.
items.abstract_zh: 基于日志结构合并树（LSM-tree）的键值存储因其优异的写入性能而被许多大规模数据存储应用广泛采用。然而，这种写入性能的提升主要来自于由于 LSM 树的分级和日志结构的内在特性而导致的读取性能的降低。因此，现有LSM-tree的关键挑战是如何通过减少读放大来提高读效率。本文首次提出了 Tidal-tree-Mem，这是一种新颖的数据结构，其中数据在类似 LSM 树的 Tidal 波中流动。首先，提出了一种浮动策略，允许LSM树底部经常访问的文件移动到更高的位置，减少读放大。其次，提出了一种拉伸策略来改变 LSM 树的形状，以适应具有不同特征的工作负载。为了评估 Tidal-tree-Mem 的性能，我们使用 YCSB 的标准基准进行了一系列实验。实验结果表明，与代表性方案相比，Tidal-tree-Mem能够有效降低读放大和整体延迟，分别降低71.94%和47.34%以上。

items.title: Dedicated Instruction Set for Pattern-Based Data Transfers: An Experimental Validation on Systems Containing In-Memory Computing Units.
items.abstract: In-memory computing (IMC) aims at solving the performance gap between CPU and memories introduced by the memory wall. However, general-purpose IMC does not consider the optimization of data transfers for patterns, such as stencils and convolutions. This article proposes a new instruction set architecture (ISA) and a novel pattern encoding for IMC to transfer and organize data streams in order to perform efficiently computation. This instruction set is implemented on the data-locality management unit (DMU) as a subset of the computational SRAM (C-SRAM) ISA. A programming model to interact with the DMU at language level is also presented in this article. This DMU ISA is evaluated on six applications run on three different system nodes. These system nodes are based on existing RISC-V cores and range from embedded to high-performance computing domain. Experiments show on average a speed-up of × 8.81 , an energy reduction factor of × 6.81 , and an improvement of the number of operations per cycle of × 4.59 , for the C-SRAM architecture integrating the proposed ISA of the DMU compared to a reference implementation on embedded systems. Results also show an improvement of the number of operations per cycle of × 2.99 compared to a reference implementation on all system nodes.
