items.abstract_zh: 由于深度神经网络 (DNN) 处理的片上计算能力有限，高清视频识别 (VOR) 任务作为消费级 SoC 中的实时任务并不容易实现。尽管事实上已经提出了许多用于快速 VOR 的加速器，但它们仍然与视频解码器固有的视频压缩知识相隔离。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种用于实时视频识别的视频解码器辅助神经网络加速框架。首先，考虑到视频压缩过程中非关键帧可以由关键帧高保真地动态重建，我们提出了VR-DANN算法，以类似的方式重建非关键帧的VOR结果，从而节省大量的NN计算能力。在 VR-DANN 中，我们利用运动矢量、视频解码过程中已有的时空信息来促进识别过程，并提出一种基于神经网络的轻量级细化方案来抑制非像素识别噪声。此外，我们认为视频帧中存在大量冗余信息，因为感兴趣的对象通常只占视频帧的一小部分。因此，我们提出基于对象的加速算法（Jigsaw-VOR），通过在进行计算密集型 DNN 过程之前丢弃帧中的冗余信息来避免不必要的计算。具体来说，我们采用运动向量来跟踪感兴趣对象的大致位置，然后将它们合并到一个统一的框架中，以便像拼图游戏一样进行 DNN 处理。与视频流中的原始帧相比，加速来自于处理更少的合并帧。 VR-DANN 和 Jigsaw-VOR 可以集成以进一步加速。从硬件方面，我们提出了 VR-DANN 和 Jigsaw-VOR 架构，分别加速 VR-DANN 和 Jigsaw-VOR 算法。这两种架构可以结合起来以获得更高的性能提升。我们的实验结果表明，VR-DANN 架构实现了 2.9× 性能提升，与相比，精度损失不到 1%最先进的“FAVOS”方案。此外，实验结果表明，将 Jigsaw-VOR 应用于所有帧可以实现 2.4× 性能提升，且精度相当与FAVOS相比。通过结合 VR-DANN 和 Jigsaw-VOR 方案，性能提升可达 3.6× 。

items.title: Clock-Latency-Aware Fault-Tolerant DLL for Multi-Die Clock Synchronization.
items.abstract: A delay-locked loop (DLL) circuit is indispensable for clock synchronization in a chip incorporating several heterogeneous dice. It has been shown previously that a fault and soft-error-tolerant DLL can be achieved by triple-module redundancy (TMR) enhanced with a timing correction scheme. However, the prior work still has a severe limitation—it does not consider the latency of the clock tree, and this limitation will make it infeasible in realistic situations. We demonstrate in this article that this limitation can be overcome by a new “clock-latency-aware” architecture, thereby making a fault and soft-error-tolerant DLL truly realistic.
items.abstract_zh: 延迟锁定环（DLL）电路对于包含多个异构芯片的芯片中的时钟同步是必不可少的。先前已经表明，可以通过时序校正方案增强的三模块冗余 (TMR) 来实现容错和软错误 DLL。然而，现有的工作仍然存在严重的局限性——它没有考虑时钟树的延迟，而这种限制将使其在现实情况下不可行。我们在本文中证明，这种限制可以通过新的“时钟延迟感知”架构来克服，从而使容错和软容错 DLL 真正成为现实。

items.title: PHCG: Optimizing Simulink Code Generation for Embedded System With SIMD Instructions.
items.abstract: Simulink is widely used for the model-driven design of embedded systems. It is able to generate optimized embedded control software code through expression folding, variable reuse, etc. However, for some commonly used computing-sensitive models, such as the models for signal processing applications, the efficiency of the generated code is still limited. In this article, we propose PHCG, an optimized code generator for the Simulink model with single-instruction–multiple-data (SIMD) instruction synthesis. It will select the optimal implementations for intensive computing actors based on adaptively precalculation of the input scales, and synthesize the appropriate SIMD instructions for batch computing actors based on the iterative dataflow graph mapping. In addition, actors of the same type that can be executed in parallel can be combined into batch computing actors as much as possible by merging isomorphic subgraphs. We implemented and evaluated its performance on benchmark Simulink models. Compared to the built-in Simulink Coder and the most recent DFSynth, the code generated by PHCG achieves an improvement of 38.9%–92.9% and 41.2%–76.8% in terms of execution time across different architectures and compilers, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: Simulink 广泛用于嵌入式系统的模型驱动设计。它能够通过表达式折叠、变量重用等方式生成优化的嵌入式控制软件代码。然而，对于一些常用的计算敏感模型，例如信号处理应用的模型，生成的代码的效率仍然有限。在本文中，我们提出了 PHCG，这是一种用于 Simulink 模型的优化代码生成器，具有单指令多数据 (SIMD) 指令合成功能。它将根据输入尺度的自适应预计算为密集计算参与者选择最佳实现，并根据迭代数据流图映射为批量计算参与者合成适当的SIMD指令。另外，可以通过合并同构子图的方式，将能够并行执行的同类型actor尽可能组合成批量计算actor。我们在基准 Simulink 模型上实现并评估了其性能。与内置的 Simulink Coder 和最新的 DFSynth 相比，PHCG 生成的代码在不同架构和编译器的执行时间方面分别提高了 38.9%–92.9% 和 41.2%–76.8%。

items.title: Germanium- and Silicon-Nanotransistor Designs by Electrical and Thermal Self-Consistent Analysis.
items.abstract: This study evaluated nanometer gate length germanium (Ge) transistors, including the electrical and thermal components, and compared them with silicon (Si) transistors. Nanometer-scale Ge and Si junction-less field-effect transistors (JLFETs) were treated for both NFET and PFET devices under a transient response. Consequently, the electrical and thermal self-consistent simulations revealed that hole carrier transport is more challenging at the channel region for PFET, inhibiting process shrinking. Moreover, the results show that self-heating can reach a dangerous stature, particularly when the channel region is thick. This is because the operation of the nanometer-scale Ge and Si JLFETs depends on the quantum effect, which increases the band-gap energy. The suitable channel design for Ge and Si transistors is almost similar; a heavier doping concentration is favorable for Si transistors. The study concludes that optimizing the channel region to fit the band-gap energy is the most crucial aspect for designing transistors.
items.abstract_zh: 这项研究评估了纳米栅极长度的锗 (Ge) 晶体管，包括电气和热元件，并将其与硅 (Si) 晶体管进行了比较。针对瞬态响应下的 NFET 和 PFET 器件，对纳米级 Ge 和 Si 无结场效应晶体管 (JLFET) 进行了处理。因此，电学和热学自洽模拟表明，PFET 沟道区的空穴载流子传输更具挑战性，从而抑制了工艺缩小。此外，结果表明，自加热可能达到危险的程度，特别是当沟道区域较厚时。这是因为纳米级 Ge 和 Si JLFET 的运行取决于量子效应，量子效应会增加带隙能量。 Ge 和 Si 晶体管的合适沟道设计几乎相似；较高的掺杂浓度有利于硅晶体管。研究得出的结论是，优化沟道区以适应带隙能量是设计晶体管最关键的方面。

items.title: NCache: A Machine-Learning Cache Management Scheme for Computational SSDs.
items.abstract: Inside a solid-state disk (SSD), cache stores frequently accessed data to shorten the user-I/O response time and reduce the number of read/write operations in flash memory, thereby improving SSD performance and lifetime. Most existing cache schemes anchor in the spatiotemporal locality of I/O requests in workloads. In the face of a long-time workload, high performance and hit rate often get lost in these caching schemes. Flash memory-aware caching schemes trade hit ratio to prolong SSD lifetime. In this article, we advocate for a machine-learning-based caching scheme named NCache to optimize both hit ratio and SSD performance. In NCache, we construct a machine learning (i.e., ML) model to predict whether data are reaccessed before being evicted from the cache. The cache replacement scheme preferentially evicts data that would not be accessed in the cache. The cache space is conserved for valid data that are likely to be repeatedly accessed. A pipelined scheme is implemented to accelerate the ML model, alleviating the time-cost of NCache. A double-linked list boosts the data addressing and cache replacement process. NCache is orthogonal to the existing caching schemes within the flash translation layer. The results validate NCache under a handful of real-world enterprise traces. Taking prn_0 as an example, NCache reduces the response time of LRU, clean first LRU (CFLRU), GCaR_LRU, GCaR_CFLRU, and LCR by up to 15% with an average of 6.4%. The erase count is slashed by 16% at the maximum. Importantly, NCache is adroit at optimizing write amplification by up to 15.9%.
items.abstract_zh: 在固态硬盘 (SSD) 内部，缓存存储经常访问的数据，以缩短用户 I/O 响应时间并减少闪存中的读/写操作次数，从而提高 SSD 的性能和使用寿命。大多数现有缓存方案都锚定在工作负载中 I/O 请求的时空局部性。面对长时间的工作负载，高性能和命中率往往会在这些缓存方案中丢失。闪存感知缓存方案以命中率为代价来延长 SSD 的使用寿命。在本文中，我们提倡一种名为 NCache 的基于机器学习的缓存方案，以优化命中率和 SSD 性能。在 NCache 中，我们构建了一个机器学习（即 ML）模型来预测数据在从缓存中逐出之前是否会被重新访问。缓存替换方案优先驱逐缓存中不会被访问的数据。缓存空间是为可能被重复访问的有效数据保留的。实施流水线方案来加速 ML 模型，减轻 NCache 的时间成本。双链表增强了数据寻址和缓存替换过程。 NCache 与闪存转换层内现有的缓存方案正交。结果在一些真实的企业跟踪下验证了 NCache。以 prn_0 为例，NCache 将 LRU、clean first LRU (CFLRU)、GCaR_LRU、GCaR_CFLRU 和 LCR 的响应时间降低了高达 15%，平均为 6.4%。擦除次数最多减少16%。重要的是，NCache 擅长优化写入放大高达 15.9%。

items.title: Asymptotically Optimal Circuit Depth for Quantum State Preparation and General Unitary Synthesis.
items.abstract: The quantum state preparation problem aims to prepare an n -qubit quantum state |\psi _v\rangle =\sum _k=0^2^n-1v_k|k\rangle from the initial state |0\rangle ^\otimes n , for a given unit vector v=(v_0,v_1,v_2,\ldots,v_2^n-1)^T\in \mathbb C^2^n with \|v\|_2 = 1 . The problem is of fundamental importance in quantum algorithm design, Hamiltonian simulation and quantum machine learning, yet its circuit depth complexity remains open when ancillary qubits are available. In this article, we study quantum circuits when there are m ancillary qubits available. We construct, for any m , circuits that can prepare |\psi _v\rangle in depth \tilde O((2^n/[m+n])+n) and size O(2^n) , achieving the optimal value for both measures simultaneously. These results also imply a depth complexity of \Theta (4^n/[m+n]) for quantum circuits implementing a general n -qubit unitary for any m \le O(2^n/n) number of ancillary qubits. This resolves the depth complexity for circuits without ancillary qubits. And for circuits with exponentially many ancillary qubits, our result quadratically improves the currently best upper bound of O(4^n) to \tilde \Theta (2^n) . Our circuits are deterministic, prepare the state and carry out the unitary precisely, utilize the ancillary qubits tightly and the depths are optimal in a wide parameter regime. The results can be viewed as (optimal) time-space tradeoff bounds, which is not only theoretically interesting, but also practically relevant in the current trend that the number of qubits starts to take off, by showing a way to use a large number of qubits to compensate the short qubit lifetime.
items.abstract_zh: 量子态准备问题旨在准备一个 n -qubit 量子态 |\psi _v\rangle =\sum _k=0^2^n-1v_k|k\rangle 从初始状态 |0\rangle ^\otimes n ，对于给定的单位向量 v=(v_0,v_1,v_2,\ldots,v_2^n-1)^T\in \mathbb C^2^n 与 \|v\|_2 = 1 。该问题在量子算法设计、哈密顿模拟和量子机器学习中至关重要，但当辅助量子位可用时，其电路深度复杂性仍然存在。在本文中，我们研究有 m 辅助量子位可用时的量子电路。我们为任何 m 构建可以准备 |\psi _v\rangle 深入 \tilde O((2^n/[m+n])+n) 和大小 O(2^n) ，同时实现两个度量的最优值。这些结果还意味着深度复杂度为 \Theta (4^n/[m+n]) 量子电路实现通用的 n -qubit 统一用于任何 m \le O(2^n/n) 辅助量子位的数量。这解决了没有辅助量子位的电路的深度复杂性。对于具有指数级数量的辅助量子位的电路，我们的结果以二次方的方式改进了 O(4^n)$ 的当前最佳上限 到 \tilde \Theta (2^n) 。我们的电路是确定性的，准备状态并精确执行酉，紧密利用辅助量子位，并且深度在宽参数范围内是最佳的。结果可以被视为（最佳）时空权衡界限，这不仅在理论上很有趣，而且在当前量子位数量开始起飞的趋势中也具有实际意义，通过展示一种使用大量量子位来补偿短量子位寿命的方法。

items.title: Design of General Flux-Controlled and Charge-Controlled Memristor Emulators Based on Hyperbolic Functions.
items.abstract: In this article, a general memristor model emulator based on the hyperbolic function is proposed. Based on the mathematical model of hyperbolic function memristor, a general circuit model emulator is designed. The general circuit can realize memristor models of different hyperbolic functions by controlling the state of switches in the circuit. The advantage of the emulator is that it can realize three different mathematical models of hyperbolic function and be easily integrated. The circuit of the hyperbolic function memristor model conforms to three basic characteristics of the mem-element, so it can be regarded as a memristor element. Finally, the model of charge-controlled memristor based on hyperbolic function is derived. The universal memristor model proposed in this article enriches the research of constructing memristor components with existing components and provides a reference for future research on mem-element emulators.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于双曲函数的通用忆阻器模型仿真器。基于双曲函数忆阻器的数学模型，设计了通用电路模型仿真器。通用电路可以通过控制电路中开关的状态来实现不同双曲函数的忆阻器模型。该仿真器的优点是可以实现三种不同的双曲函数数学模型，并且易于集成。双曲函数忆阻器模型的电路符合忆阻器元件的三个基本特性，因此可以将其视为忆阻器元件。最后推导了基于双曲函数的电荷控制忆阻器模型。本文提出的通用忆阻器模型丰富了利用现有元件构建忆阻器元件的研究，为未来忆阻器仿真器的研究提供了参考。

items.title: Gibbon: An Efficient Co-Exploration Framework of NN Model and Processing-In-Memory Architecture.
items.abstract: The memristor-based processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures have been proven to be a potential architecture to store enormous parameters and execute the complicated computations of deep neural networks (DNNs) efficiently. Existing PIM studies focus on designing high energy-efficient hardware architecture and algorithm-hardware co-optimization for better performance. However, the impacts of the algorithms and hardware architectures on the performance intersect with each other. Only optimizing the algorithms or the hardware architectures cannot realize the optimal design. Therefore, the co-exploration of NN models and PIM architecture is necessary. However, for one thing, the co-exploration space size of NN models and PIM architectures is extremely huge, and is challenging to search. For another, during the co-exploration process, time-consuming PIM simulators are needed to evaluate various design candidates and pose a heavy time burden. To tackle these problems, we propose an efficient co-exploration framework of NN models and PIM architectures, named Gibbon. In Gibbon, the co-exploration space is carefully designed to adapt both NN models and PIM architectures. Besides, in order to improve search efficiency, we propose an evolutionary search algorithm with adaptive parameter priority (ESAPP). In addition, Gibbon introduces a multilevel joint simulator to alleviate the problem of time-consuming evaluation. The experimental results show that the proposed co-exploration framework can find better NN models and PIM architectures than existing studies in only six GPU hours ( 9.8× – 48.2× speed-up). At the same time, Gibbon can improve the accuracy of co-design results by 15.3% and reduce the energy–delay-product (EDP) by 5.96× compared with existing work.
items.abstract_zh: 基于忆阻器的内存处理（PIM）架构已被证明是一种潜在的架构，可以存储大量参数并有效执行深度神经网络（DNN）的复杂计算。现有的 PIM 研究重点是设计高能效硬件架构和算法-硬件协同优化以获得更好的性能。然而，算法和硬件架构对性能的影响是相互交叉的。仅优化算法或硬件架构并不能实现最优设计。因此，神经网络模型和PIM架构的共同探索是必要的。然而，一方面，NN 模型和 PIM 架构的协同探索空间规模非常巨大，并且搜索起来具有挑战性。另一方面，在共探过程中，需要耗时的PIM模拟器来评估各种设计候选方案，造成沉重的时间负担。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种神经网络模型和 PIM 架构的高效协同探索框架，名为 Gibbon。在 Gibbon 中，协同探索空间经过精心设计，以适应 NN 模型和 PIM 架构。此外，为了提高搜索效率，我们提出了一种具有自适应参数优先级的进化搜索算法（ESAPP）。此外，Gibbon还引入了多级联合模拟器来缓解评估耗时的问题。实验结果表明，所提出的协同探索框架只需六个 GPU 小时即可找到比现有研究更好的 NN 模型和 PIM 架构 ( 9.8× – 48.2× 加速）。同时，Gibbon 可以将协同设计结果的准确性提高 15.3%，并将能量延迟积 (EDP) 降低 5.96× 与现有工作相比。

items.title: Golden-Free Robust Age Estimation to Triage Recycled ICs.
items.abstract: Nondestructive golden-free detection of recycled/counterfeit integrated circuits (ICs) is the focus of this article. This is achieved by estimating the functional/operational age of the IC. The age estimation method is based on exploiting short-term aging effects in advanced transistor technologies to induce bit errors at the IC’s output. Gate-level simulations are used to capture the impact of workload on short-term aging. In advanced technology nodes, including bulk CMOS at 45 nm or below and FinFET, combining transistor aging with ultrafast voltage scaling magnifies the effects of aging-induced degradation at high voltage when voltage scales to a lower level, causing short-term aging-based timing violations. These timing violations create bit errors at IC outputs. We employ the bit error patterns to build a machine learning (ML)-based nonlinear regression model to estimate the IC’s age. Our study confirms that short-term aging-induced output bit error patterns can be used to estimate long-term age of an IC. If the IC’s age is beyond a predefined threshold, it can be marked as recycled. Although this article considers the FinFET technology, the method applies to bulk CMOS advanced nodes at 45 nm or below. We model IC-to-IC variations taking into account the voltage scaling. We demonstrate the approach on two cryptographic ICs and the method accurately estimates the long-term age of an IC, facilitating recycled IC detection.
items.abstract_zh: 回收/假冒集成电路 (IC) 的无损无金检测是本文的重点。这是通过估计 IC 的功能/运行寿命来实现的。老化估计方法基于利用先进晶体管技术中的短期老化效应来诱发 IC 输出的位错误。门级模拟用于捕获工作负载对短期老化的影响。在先进技术节点（包括 45 nm 或以下的体 CMOS 和 FinFET）中，将晶体管老化与超快电压缩放相结合，会在电压缩放到较低水平时放大高电压下老化引起的退化的影响，从而导致短期的基于老化的时序违规。这些时序违规会在 IC 输出处产生位错误。我们利用误码模式构建基于机器学习 (ML) 的非线性回归模型来估计 IC 的寿命。我们的研究证实，短期老化引起的输出误码模式可用于估计 IC 的长期寿命。如果 IC 的寿命超出了预定义的阈值，则可以将其标记为回收。尽管本文考虑的是 FinFET 技术，但该方法适用于 45 nm 或以下的体 CMOS 先进节点。我们对 IC 到 IC 的变化进行建模，同时考虑电压缩放。我们在两个加密 IC 上演示了该方法，该方法可以准确估计 IC 的长期寿命，从而促进回收 IC 的检测。

items.title: Joint Optimization of Dimension Reduction and Mixed-Precision Quantization for Activation Compression of Neural Networks.
items.abstract: Recently, deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved eye-catching results in various applications. However, intensive memory access of activations introduces considerable energy consumption, resulting in a great challenge for deploying CNNs on resource-constrained edge devices. Existing research utilizes dimension reduction (DR) and mixed-precision (MP) quantization separately to reduce computational complexity without paying attention to their interaction. Such naïve concatenation of different compression strategies ends up with suboptimal performance. To develop a comprehensive compression framework, we propose an optimization system by jointly considering DR and MP quantization, which is enabled by independent groupwise learnable MP schemes. Group partitioning is guided by a well-designed automatic group partition mechanism that can distinguish compression priorities among channels, and it can deal with the tradeoff between model accuracy and compressibility. Moreover, to preserve model accuracy under low bit-width quantization, we propose a dynamic bit-width searching technique to enable continuous bit-width reduction. Our experimental results show that the proposed system reaches 69.03%/70.73% with average 2.16/2.61 bits per value on Resnet18/MobileNetV2, while introducing only approximately 1% accuracy loss of the uncompressed full-precision models. Compared with individual activation compression schemes, the proposed joint optimization system reduces 55%/9% (−2.62/−0.27 bits) memory access of DR and 55%/63% (−2.60/−4.52 bits) memory access of MP quantization, respectively, on Resnet18/ MobileNetV2 with comparable or even higher accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，深度卷积神经网络（CNN）在各种应用中取得了引人注目的成果。然而，激活的密集内存访问会带来相当大的能耗，这给在资源受限的边缘设备上部署 CNN 带来了巨大的挑战。现有研究分别利用降维（DR）和混合精度（MP）量化来降低计算复杂度，而不关注它们的相互作用。这种不同压缩策略的简单串联最终导致性能不佳。为了开发一个全面的压缩框架，我们提出了一个联合考虑 DR 和 MP 量化的优化系统，该系统是通过独立的分组可学习 MP 方案来实现的。组划分由精心设计的自动组划分机制引导，该机制可以区分通道之间的压缩优先级，并且可以处理模型精度和可压缩性之间的权衡。此外，为了在低位宽量化下保持模型精度，我们提出了一种动态位宽搜索技术来实现连续位宽减小。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的系统在 Resnet18/MobileNetV2 上平均每个值 2.16/2.61 位，达到 69.03%/70.73%，同时仅引入未压缩全精度模型约 1% 的精度损失。与单独的激活压缩方案相比，所提出的联合优化系统在Resnet18/MobileNetV2上分别减少了55%/9%（−2.62/−0.27位）DR的内存访问和55%/63%（−2.60/−4.52位）MP量化的内存访问，并且具有相当甚至更高的精度。

items.title: A Robustness-Based Confidence Measure for Hybrid System Falsification.
items.abstract: Verification of hybrid systems is very challenging, if not impossible, due to their continuous dynamics that leads to infinite state space. As a countermeasure, falsification is usually applied to show that a specification does not hold, by searching for a falsifying input as a counterexample that refutes the specification. A falsification algorithm exploits the quantitative robust semantics of temporal specifications, which provides a numerical robustness that tells how robustly a specification holds or not, and uses it as a guide to explore the input space toward the direction of robustness descent—once negative robustness is observed, it indicates that a falsifying input is found. However, if a falsification algorithm does not return any falsifying input, a user is not sure whether the specification does indeed hold, or there exist counterexamples that the algorithm did not manage to reach. In this case, a measurement on how likely there indeed exists no counterexample in the input space is necessary for better understanding the safety of the system and deciding whether more budget should be allocated for the falsification. To this end, we propose a confidence measure that assesses the likelihood that the system is not falsifiable, i.e., how confident a user should be that a specification holds, given the fact that an algorithm has sampled a set of inputs but did not find any falsifying one. The confidence measure is defined in terms of a coverage criterion of the input space that assesses to which extent the whole input space is explored and a local area is exploited where low robustness is observed. Experiments on commonly used falsification benchmarks show that our proposed confidence measure is reasonable and can distinguish different specifications.
items.abstract_zh: 混合系统的验证即使不是不可能，也是非常具有挑战性的，因为它们的连续动态会导致无限的状态空间。作为一种对策，伪造通常用于通过搜索伪造输入作为反驳规范的反例来表明规范不成立。伪造算法利用了时间规范的定量鲁棒语义，它提供了一个数值鲁棒性来说明规范是否成立，并用它作为探索输入空间朝鲁棒性下降方向的指南——一旦观察到负鲁棒性，就表明发现了伪造输入。然而，如果伪造算法不返回任何伪造输入，则用户不确定该规范是否确实成立，或者存在该算法无法达到的反例。在这种情况下，为了更好地理解系统的安全性并决定是否应该为伪造分配更多预算，有必要测量输入空间中确实不存在反例的可能性。为此，我们提出了一种置信度度量，用于评估系统不可证伪的可能性，即，考虑到算法已经对一组输入进行了采样但没有发现任何可证伪的输入，用户应该对规范保持多大的信心。置信度度量是根据输入空间的覆盖标准来定义的，该覆盖标准评估整个输入空间被探索的程度以及观察到低鲁棒性的局部区域被利用的程度。在常用的伪造基准上进行的实验表明，我们提出的置信度度量是合理的，并且可以区分不同的规格。

items.title: MCM-GPU Voltage Noise Characterization and Architecture-Level Mitigation.
items.abstract: Due to manufacturing process and yield constraints, scaling GPU performance via increasing chip area becomes difficult. In the meanwhile, the demand for high computational throughput is increasing for high performance computing applications. As an alternative, multichip module GPU (MCM-GPU) achieves performance scalability via integrating multiple GPU chip modules (GPMs) on the same package. However, large MCM-GPU systems are susceptible to voltage noise effects, which cause voltage instability during program execution and result in energy inefficiency. In this work, we first model and analyze the voltage noise of MCM-GPUs at architecture level in detail. We characterize the voltage noise distributions of MCM-GPUs at different levels and under various design parameters. We further propose two architecture level voltage noise mitigation approaches, including GPM aware mitigation (GAM) and droop magnitude aware smoothing (DMAS), that leverage the voltage noise characteristics of MCM-GPUs. Evaluation shows both techniques are effective in reducing the voltage droop magnitudes and achieve good energy savings with negligible performance degradation.
items.abstract_zh: 由于制造工艺和良率的限制，通过增加芯片面积来扩展 GPU 性能变得困难。与此同时，高性能计算应用对高计算吞吐量的需求不断增加。作为替代方案，多芯片模块 GPU (MCM-GPU) 通过在同一封装上集成多个 GPU 芯片模块 (GPM) 来实现性能可扩展性。然而，大型MCM-GPU系统容易受到电压噪声影响，从而导致程序执行期间电压不稳定并导致能源效率低下。在这项工作中，我们首先在架构级别详细建模和分析 MCM-GPU 的电压噪声。我们描述了 MCM-GPU 在不同级别和不同设计参数下的电压噪声分布。我们进一步提出了两种架构级电压噪声缓解方法，包括 GPM 感知缓解（GAM）和下垂幅度感知平滑（DMAS），它们利用了 MCM-GPU 的电压噪声特性。评估表明，这两种技术都能有效降低电压降幅度，并在性能下降可忽略不计的情况下实现良好的节能效果。

items.title: MAPD: An FPGA-Based Real-Time Video Haze Removal Accelerator Using Mixed Atmosphere Prior.
items.abstract: Real-time video dehazing plays a key role in helping autonomous driving detect pedestrians or obstacles in severe foggy weather to prevent potential hazards. Existing video dehazing methods achieve good restoration performance but still suffer from oversaturation and low dehazing speed, especially for high-definition (HD, high-resolution) videos. In this article, we propose a mixed atmosphere prior information video dehazing accelerator (MAPD) and implement it on field programmable gate array (FPGA) to achieve real-time haze removal for HD video. MAPD provides a mixed atmospheric light model by applying heterogeneous atmospheric light in the foreground area to balance brightness deviation, and maintaining the global atmospheric light in the background region. Considering the parallel characteristics of FPGA, MAPD leverages the redundant information between adjacent frames to accelerate the dehazing process and designs an indirect transmission estimation to decrease resource consumption. For comparison, we also implement six dehazing solutions (DCP, color ellipsoid prior (CEP), RDCP, FFVD, MHVD, and REFD) on FPGA, and deploy a graphics processing unit (GPU)-based method (D^4) on the platform with Nvidia 3080 GPU. Experiments using two widely used benchmarks show that MAPD increases the performance by up to 36.5%, 53.5%, 36.3%, 33.3%, 11.9%, and 23.3%, decreases resource consumption by up to 79.7%, 75.0%, 74.8%, 25.6%, 22.6%, and 73.9% and enhances FPS for HD videos by up to 241.6%, 145.9%, 151.7%, 68.6%, 50.6%, and 62.4%, compared with DCP, CEP, RDCP, FFVD, MHVD, and REFD. Compared to D^4 , MAPD also promotes the dehazing performance by up to 21.8%, and increases FPS by up to 487.0%.
items.abstract_zh: 实时视频去雾对于帮助自动驾驶在大雾天气下检测行人或障碍物、预防潜在危险发挥着关键作用。现有的视频去雾方法取得了良好的恢复性能，但仍然存在过饱和和去雾速度低的问题，特别是对于高清（HD，高分辨率）视频。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合气氛先验信息视频去雾加速器（MAPD），并在现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）上实现，以实现高清视频的实时去雾。 MAPD提供了一种混合大气光模型，通过在前景区域应用异构大气光来平衡亮度偏差，并在背景区域保持全局大气光。考虑到FPGA的并行特性，MAPD利用相邻帧之间的冗余信息来加速去雾过程，并设计间接传输估计来减少资源消耗。为了进行比较，我们还在 FPGA 上实现了六种去雾解决方案（DCP、彩色椭球先验 (CEP)、RDCP、FFVD、MHVD 和 REFD），并部署基于图形处理单元 (GPU) 的方法 (D^4) 在具有 Nvidia 3080 GPU 的平台上。使用两个广泛使用的基准进行的实验表明，MAPD 可将性能提高高达 36.5%、53.5%、36.3%、33.3%、11.9% 和 23.3%，将资源消耗降低高达 79.7%、75.0%、74.8%、25.6%、22.6% 和 73.9%，并提高高清视频的 FPS与 DCP、CEP、RDCP、FFVD、MHVD 和 REFD 相比，提高高达 241.6%、145.9%、151.7%、68.6%、50.6% 和 62.4%。与 D^4 相比，MAPD 的去雾性能也提升了高达 21.8%，并且增加了FPS 提升高达 487.0%。

items.title: SpecWands: An Efficient Priority-Based Scheduler Against Speculation Contention Attacks.
items.abstract: Transient execution attacks (TEAs) have gradually become a major security threat to modern high-performance processors. They exploit the vulnerability of speculative execution to illegally access private data, and transmit them through timing-based covert channels. While new vulnerabilities are discovered continuously, the covert channels can be categorized to two types: 1) Persistent Type, in which covert channels are based on the layout changes of buffering, e.g., through caches or TLBs and 2) Volatile Type, in which covert channels are based on the contention of sharing resources, e.g., through execution units or issuing ports. The defenses against the persistent-type covert channels have been well addressed, while those for the volatile-type are still rather inadequate. Existing mitigation schemes for the volatile type such as Speculative Compression and Time-Division-Multiplexing will introduce significant overhead due to the need to stall the pipeline or to disallow resource sharing. In this article, we look into such attacks and defenses with a new perspective, and propose a scheduling-based mitigation scheme, called SpecWands. It consists of three priority-based scheduling policies to prevent an attacker from transmitting the secret in different contention situations. SpecWands not only can defend against both interthread and intrathread-based attacks but also can keep most of the performance benefit from speculative execution and resource-sharing. We evaluate its runtime overhead on SPEC 2017 benchmarks and realistic programs. The experimental results show that SpecWands has a significant performance advantage over the other two representative schemes.
items.abstract_zh: 瞬态执行攻击（TEA）已逐渐成为现代高性能处理器的主要安全威胁。他们利用推测执行的漏洞来非法访问私人数据，并通过基于时间的隐蔽通道传输这些数据。虽然不断发现新的漏洞，隐蔽通道可分为两种类型：1）持久型，其中隐蔽通道基于缓冲的布局变化，例如通过缓存或TLB；2）易失性类型，其中隐蔽通道基于共享资源的争用，例如通过执行单元或发布端口。对持久型隐蔽通道的防御已经得到很好的解决，而对易失型隐蔽通道的防御还相当不足。由于需要停止管道或不允许资源共享，现有的易失性类型缓解方案（例如推测压缩和时分复用）将引入大量开销。在本文中，我们以新的视角研究此类攻击和防御，并提出一种基于调度的缓解方案，称为 SpecWands。它由三个基于优先级的调度策略组成，以防止攻击者在不同的争用情况下传输秘密。 SpecWands 不仅可以防御线程间和基于线程内的攻击，还可以保留推测执行和资源共享带来的大部分性能优势。我们在 SPEC 2017 基准测试和实际程序上评估其运行时开销。实验结果表明，SpecWands相对于其他两种代表性方案具有显着的性能优势。

items.title: Spintronic Memristor-Based Binarized Ensemble Convolutional Neural Network Architectures.
items.abstract: Several recent studies have proposed the utilization of emerging technology devices, such as ReRAM, spintronic, and phase change memory in hardware-implemented neural network designs. However, the current poor maturity of the manufacturing process of memristive devices limits the implementation of synapses to low precision weights and to smaller size crossbars, which could be an issue for complex, higher dimensions machine vector learning tasks (e.g., object recognition, classifications, etc). Face to these challenges, efficient hardware implementations use binarization for weights and activation functions in the attempt to reach better energy efficiency, reduce the utilization of memory and the execution time. Moreover, to compensate the immaturity of the emerging devices technology and achieve better convergence, accuracy, and speed for learning and inference process, the neural network has to be designed either with an increased degree of redundancy, or with error correction capabilities. To avoid the inherent hardware cost of the redundancy and counteract the aforementioned issues, we propose an approach combining the concept of Ensemble Neural Networks paradigm with analog in-memory hardware implementation with spin-orbit torque (SOT) spintronic devices. These devices are among the most power-efficient emerging technologies. The architectural performances, power, and accuracy are verified on several datasets, showing that these combined approaches allow not only a very good resilience to high bit error rates but also a great reduction in execution time and number of memory accesses with a further reduction of × 100 for the energy consumption thanks to the SOT spintronic-based device.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的几项研究提出在硬件实现的神经网络设计中利用新兴技术设备，例如 ReRAM、自旋电子和相变存储器。然而，目前忆阻器件制造工艺的成熟度较差，限制了突触在低精度权重和较小尺寸交叉开关上的实现，这对于复杂、高维机器矢量学习任务（例如，对象识别、分类等）来说可能是一个问题。面对这些挑战，高效的硬件实现使用权重和激活函数的二值化，试图达到更好的能源效率，减少内存的利用率和执行时间。此外，为了弥补新兴设备技术的不成熟性并实现更好的收敛性、准确性和学习和推理过程的速度，神经网络必须设计成具有更高的冗余度或纠错能力。为了避免冗余的固有硬件成本并抵消上述问题，我们提出了一种将集成神经网络范式的概念与具有自旋轨道扭矩（SOT）自旋电子器件的模拟内存硬件实现相结合的方法。这些设备属于最节能的新兴技术。架构性能、功能和准确性在多个数据集上进行了验证，表明这些组合方法不仅能够很好地适应高误码率，而且还可以大大减少执行时间和内存访问次数，进一步减少notation="LaTeX">$\times 100$ 由于基于 SOT 自旋电子器件的能耗。

items.title: A Markov Chain Framework for Modeling the Statistical Properties of Stochastic Computing Finite-State Machines.
items.abstract: A general methodology to derive analytically the statistical properties of stochastic computing finite-state machines (SFSMs) is introduced. The SFSMs, expressed as Moore ones, are modeled using Markov Chains (MCs), enabling the derivation in closed form of their output sequences’ statistical properties, including their expected value, their auto- and cross-correlation, their auto- and cross-covariance, their variance and standard deviation as well as their mean squared error. An MC overflow/underflow probability model accompanies the methodology, allowing to calculate analytically the expected number of steps before overflows/underflows, setting the guidelines to select the register’s size that reduces erroneous bits originating from them. In the proposed methodology both the input sequence length and the number of the SFSMs’ states are considered as parameters, accelerating the overall design procedure as the necessity for multiple time-consuming numerical simulations is eliminated. The proposed methodology’s accurate modeling capabilities are demonstrated with its application in two SFSMs selected from the stochastic computing literature, while comparisons with the numerical experiments justify its correctness.
items.abstract_zh: 介绍了一种分析推导随机计算有限状态机 (SFSM) 统计特性的通用方法。 SFSM，表示为摩尔链，使用马尔可夫链 (MC) 进行建模，能够以封闭形式推导其输出序列的统计特性，包括它们的期望值、它们的自相关和互相关、它们的自协方差和互协方差、它们的方差和标准差以及它们的均方误差。该方法附带了 MC 上溢/下溢概率模型，允许分析计算上溢/下溢之前的预期步骤数，设置指南以选择寄存器的大小，以减少源自寄存器的错误位。在所提出的方法中，输入序列长度和 SFSM 状态数量都被视为参数，由于消除了多次耗时的数值模拟的必要性，因此加快了整体设计过程。该方法的精确建模能力通过其在随机计算文献中选择的两个 SFSM 中的应用得到了证明，同时与数值实验的比较证明了其正确性。

items.title: INFORM: Inverse Design Methodology for Constrained Multiobjective Optimization.
items.abstract: Many system design methods use population-based optimization or a surrogate model for solving constrained multiobjective optimization (CMOO). When designing a system with multiple objectives and constraints, the designer may first be interested in understanding the tradeoffs among different objectives from a small number of simulations. In the next step, the designer may focus on specific regions of interest in the design space near a set of nondominated solutions to further improve performance on the targeted objectives. This may help make the search process sample-efficient. We propose inverse design methodology for constrained multiobjective optimization (INFORM): a two-step approach for sample-efficient CMOO of real-world nonlinear systems. In the first step, we modify a genetic algorithm (GA) to make the design process sample-efficient. We inject candidate solutions into the GA population using inverse design methods instead of determining the candidate solutions for the next generation using only crossover and mutation, as is done in standard GA. We present three types of inverse design techniques based on: 1) a neural network (NN) verifier; 2) NN; and 3) Gaussian mixture model. The candidate solutions for the next generation are thus a mix of those generated using crossover/mutation and solutions generated using inverse design. At the end of the first step, we obtain a set of nondominated solutions. In the second step, we choose the regions of interest around the nondominated solutions to further improve the objective function values using inverse design methods. We demonstrate the efficacy of INFORM through synthesis of nonlinear systems and analog circuits. The experimental results show that INFORM reduces synthesis time by up to 29× and improves the value of the objective function by up to 33% compared to a state-of-the-art baseline design methodology.
items.abstract_zh: 许多系统设计方法使用基于群体的优化或替代模型来求解约束多目标优化（CMOO）。在设计具有多个目标和约束的系统时，设计人员可能首先有兴趣通过少量模拟了解不同目标之间的权衡。在下一步中，设计人员可能会关注设计空间中靠近一组非支配解决方案的特定感兴趣区域，以进一步提高目标的性能。这可能有助于提高搜索过程的样本效率。我们提出了约束多目标优化（INFORM）的逆向设计方法：一种用于现实世界非线性系统的样本高效 CMOO 的两步方法。第一步，我们修改遗传算法（GA）以使设计过程具有样本效率。我们使用逆向设计方法将候选解决方案注入到 GA 群体中，而不是像标准 GA 中那样仅使用交叉和变异来确定下一代的候选解决方案。我们提出了三种类型的逆向设计技术，基于：1）神经网络（NN）验证器； 2) 神经网络； 3）高斯混合模型。因此，下一代的候选解决方案是使用交叉/变异生成的解决方案和使用逆向设计生成的解决方案的混合。在第一步结束时，我们获得一组非支配解。第二步，我们选择非支配解周围的感兴趣区域，以使用逆设计方法进一步提高目标函数值。我们通过非线性系统和模拟电路的综合来证明 INFORM 的功效。实验结果表明，INFORM 将综合时间减少了 29× 并将目标函数的值提高了多达与最先进的基线设计方法相比，节省了 33%。

items.title: On Reducing LDE Variations in Modern Analog Placement.
items.abstract: Layout-dependent (LDEs) introduce an inevitable performance degradation in analog and mixed-signal circuit design with advanced process technologies below 90 nm. The main LDE sources, including the well proximity effect (WPE), length of diffusion (LOD), and the oxide-to-oxide spacing effect (OSE), cause substantial fluctuations in carrier mobility and threshold voltage of transistors. In traditional design flows, impact of these in post-layout simulation, leading to expensive re-design iterations by inspecting the physical locations of devices with respect to one another. In this article, we introduce the concept of an ideal mobility multiplier based on physics models, in order to minimize the LDE effects with a fast simulated annealing algorithm through various LDE alleviating operations. Based on the introduced mobility multiplier and the hierarchical B*-tree (HB*-tree) topological representation, our LDE-aware analog placement methodology can simultaneously optimize not only the area and wire length, but also the LDEs, while maintaining linear-packing time complexity of HB*-trees. Compared to the most recent works on 65 nm-based analog circuits, experimental results show that the proposed method can effectively and efficiently reduce LDE variations, while improving the circuit performance.
items.abstract_zh: 在采用 90 nm 以下先进工艺技术的模拟和混合信号电路设计中，布局相关 (LDE) 不可避免地会导致性能下降。 LDE 的主要来源，包括阱邻近效应 (WPE)、扩散长度 (LOD) 和氧化物间间距效应 (OSE)，会导致晶体管的载流子迁移率和阈值电压大幅波动。在传统的设计流程中，这些因素对布局后仿真的影响，通过检查设备相对于彼此的物理位置，导致昂贵的重新设计迭代。在本文中，我们介绍了基于物理模型的理想迁移率乘数的概念，以便通过各种 LDE 缓解操作，通过快速模拟退火算法来最小化 LDE 效应。基于引入的移动乘数和分层 B* 树 (HB* 树) 拓扑表示，我们的 LDE 感知模拟布局方法不仅可以同时优化面积和线长，还可以同时优化 LDE，同时保持 HB* 树的线性打包时间复杂度。与基于 65 nm 的模拟电路的最新工作相比，实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以有效且高效地减少 LDE 变化，同时提高电路性能。

items.title: Formal Modeling and Verification of Security Properties of a Ransomware-Resistant SSD.
items.abstract: Solid-state drives (SSDs) are fast emerging as the primary choice for data storage in diverse domains. However, data protection against ransomware attacks on such storage devices is a crucial challenge. A recent research work proposed an In-SSD ransomware protection mechanism to improve SSD data security. The SSD flash translation layer (FTL), which consists of an address mapping, garbage collection, and wear leveling components, is inherently the most complex part of an SSD controller. The In-SSD ransomware protection mechanism adds a new component to the FTL, making the FTL design more complex. The new component interacts with almost all other units of FTL for recovery from a ransomware attack. Such a design would naturally require rigorous verification, which is the focus of this article. In this work, we discuss the derivation of a set of security properties related to protection from ransomware that covers the security requirements and the design; we next prove such properties using symbolic model checking.
items.abstract_zh: 固态硬盘 (SSD) 正在迅速崛起，成为不同领域数据存储的主要选择。然而，保护此类存储设备免受勒索软件攻击的数据是一个严峻的挑战。最近的一项研究工作提出了一种SSD内勒索软件保护机制，以提高SSD数据的安全性。 SSD 闪存转换层 (FTL) 由地址映射、垃圾收集和磨损均衡组件组成，本质上是 SSD 控制器中最复杂的部分。 In-SSD勒索软件防护机制在FTL的基础上增加了新的组件，使得FTL的设计更加复杂。新组件与几乎所有其他 FTL 单元进行交互，以便从勒索软件攻击中恢复。这样的设计自然需要严格的验证，这也是本文的重点。在这项工作中，我们讨论了一组与勒索软件防护相关的安全属性的推导，其中涵盖了安全要求和设计；接下来我们使用符号模型检查来证明这些属性。

items.title: SDP: Co-Designing Algorithm, Dataflow, and Architecture for In-SRAM Sparse NN Acceleration.
items.abstract: Processing-in-memory (PIM) is a promising architecture for neural network (NN) acceleration. Most previous PIMs are based on analog computing, so their accuracy and memory cell array utilization are limited by analog deviation and ADC overhead. Digital PIM is an emerging type of PIM architecture that integrates digital logic in memory cells, which can make full utilization of the cell array without accuracy loss. However, digital PIM’s rigid crossbar architecture and full array activation raise new challenges in sparse NN acceleration. Conventional unstructured or structured sparsity cannot perform well on both the weight and input side of digital PIM. We take the opportunities from digital PIM’s bit-serial processing and in-memory customization, to tackle the above challenges by the co-designing sparse algorithm, multiplication dataflow, and PIM architecture. At the algorithm level, we propose double-broadcast hybrid-grained pruning to exploit weight sparsity with better accuracy and efficiency balance. At the dataflow level, we propose a bit-serial Booth in-SRAM multiplication dataflow for stable acceleration from the input side. At the architecture level, we design a sparse digital PIM (SDP) accelerator with customized SRAM-PIM macros to support the proposed techniques. SDP achieves 3.59× , 8.15× , 3.11× area efficiency, and 6.95× , 29.44× , 39.40× energy savings, over state-of-the-art sparse NN architectures SIGMA, SRE, and Bit Prudent.
items.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 是一种很有前景的神经网络 (NN) 加速架构。以前的 PIM 大多基于模拟计算，因此其精度和存储单元阵列利用率受到模拟偏差和 ADC 开销的限制。数字PIM是一种新兴的PIM架构，它将数字逻辑集成在存储单元中，可以充分利用单元阵列而不会损失精度。然而，数字 PIM 的刚性交叉架构和全阵列激活给稀疏神经网络加速带来了新的挑战。传统的非结构化或结构化稀疏性在数字 PIM 的权重和输入方面都无法表现良好。我们利用数字PIM的位串行处理和内存定制的机会，通过共同设计稀疏算法、乘法数据流和PIM架构来应对上述挑战。在算法层面，我们提出了双广播混合粒度剪枝，以利用权重稀疏性，实现更好的精度和效率平衡。在数据流层面，我们提出了一种位串行 Booth in-SRAM 乘法数据流，以实现输入侧的稳定加速。在架构层面，我们设计了一个稀疏数字 PIM (SDP) 加速器，具有定制的 SRAM-PIM 宏来支持所提出的技术。 SDP 实现 3.59× 、 8.15× , 3.11× 面积效率和 6.95× , 29.44× , 39.40× 与最先进的稀疏神经网络架构 SIGMA、SRE 和 Bit Prudent 相比，可节省能源。

items.title: AccelTran: A Sparsity-Aware Accelerator for Dynamic Inference With Transformers.
items.abstract: Self-attention-based transformer models have achieved tremendous success in the domain of natural language processing. Despite their efficacy, accelerating the transformer is challenging due to its quadratic computational complexity and large activation sizes. Existing transformer accelerators attempt to prune its tokens to reduce memory access, albeit with high compute overheads. Moreover, previous works directly operate on large matrices involved in the attention operation, which limits hardware utilization. In order to address these challenges, this work proposes a novel dynamic inference scheme, DynaTran, which prunes activations at runtime with low overhead, substantially reducing the number of ineffectual operations. This improves the throughput of transformer inference. We further propose tiling the matrices in transformer operations along with diverse dataflows to improve data reuse, thus, enabling higher energy efficiency. To effectively implement these methods, we propose AccelTran, a novel accelerator architecture for transformers. Extensive experiments with different models and benchmarks demonstrate that DynaTran achieves higher accuracy than the state-of-the-art top- k hardware-aware pruning strategy while attaining up to 1.2× higher sparsity. One of our proposed accelerators, AccelTran-Edge, achieves 330K × higher throughput with 93K × lower energy requirement when compared to a Raspberry Pi device. On the other hand, AccelTran-Server achieves 5.73× higher throughput and 3.69× lower energy consumption compared to the state-of-the-art transformer co-processor, Energon. The simulation source code is available at https://github.com/jha-lab/acceltran .
items.abstract_zh: 基于自注意力的 Transformer 模型在自然语言处理领域取得了巨大的成功。尽管它们很有效，但由于其二次计算复杂性和较大的激活大小，加速变压器仍然具有挑战性。现有的变压器加速器尝试修剪其令牌以减少内存访问，尽管计算开销很高。此外，之前的工作直接对注意力操作涉及的大矩阵进行操作，这限制了硬件利用率。为了应对这些挑战，这项工作提出了一种新颖的动态推理方案 DynaTran，它可以在运行时以较低的开销修剪激活，从而大大减少无效操作的数量。这提高了变压器推理的吞吐量。我们进一步建议将变压器操作中的矩阵与不同的数据流一起平铺，以提高数据重用，从而实现更高的能源效率。为了有效地实现这些方法，我们提出了 AccelTran，一种新颖的 Transformer 加速器架构。使用不同模型和基准进行的大量实验表明，DynaTran 比最先进的顶级 $k$ 实现了更高的精度 硬件感知修剪策略，同时达到 1.2× 更高的稀疏性。我们建议的加速器之一 AccelTran-Edge 可实现 330K × 更高的吞吐量与 Raspberry Pi 设备相比，能源需求降低 93K × 能源需求较低。另一方面，AccelTran-Server 实现了 5.73× 更高的吞吐量和 3.69× 与最先进的变压器协处理器 Energon 相比，能耗更低。仿真源代码位于 https://github.com/jha-lab/acceltran 。

items.title: TransCODE: Co-Design of Transformers and Accelerators for Efficient Training and Inference.
items.abstract: Automated co-design of machine learning models and evaluation hardware is critical for efficiently deploying such models at scale. Despite the state-of-the-art performance of transformer models, they are not yet ready for execution on resource-constrained hardware platforms. High memory requirements and low parallelizability of the transformer architecture exacerbate this problem. Recently proposed accelerators attempt to optimize the throughput and energy consumption of transformer models. However, such works are either limited to a one-sided search of the model architecture or a restricted set of off-the-shelf devices. Furthermore, previous works only accelerate model inference and not training, which incurs substantially higher memory and compute resources, making the problem even more challenging. To address these limitations, this work proposes a dynamic training framework, called DynaProp, that speeds up the training process and reduces memory consumption. DynaProp is a low-overhead pruning method that prunes activations and gradients at runtime. To effectively execute this method on hardware for a diverse set of transformer architectures, we propose a flexible BERT accelerator, a framework that simulates transformer inference and training on a design space of accelerators. We use this simulator in conjunction with the proposed co-design technique, called TransCODE, to obtain the best-performing models with high accuracy on the given task and minimize latency, energy consumption, and chip area. The obtained transformer–accelerator pair achieves 0.3% higher accuracy than the state-of-the-art pair while incurring 5.2× lower latency and 3.0× lower energy consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习模型和评估硬件的自动化协同设计对于大规模有效部署此类模型至关重要。尽管 Transformer 模型具有最先进的性能，但它们尚未准备好在资源受限的硬件平台上执行。变压器架构的高内存要求和低并行性加剧了这个问题。最近提出的加速器试图优化变压器模型的吞吐量和能耗。然而，此类工作要么仅限于模型架构的片面搜索，要么仅限于一组有限的现成设备。此外，以前的工作仅加速模型推理而不是训练，这会占用更高的内存和计算资源，使问题变得更具挑战性。为了解决这些限制，这项工作提出了一种称为 DynaProp 的动态训练框架，可以加快训练过程并减少内存消耗。 DynaProp 是一种低开销修剪方法，可在运行时修剪激活和梯度。为了在硬件上针对不同的 Transformer 架构有效地执行该方法，我们提出了一种灵活的 BERT 加速器，这是一个在加速器设计空间上模拟 Transformer 推理和训练的框架。我们将该模拟器与所提出的称为 TransCODE 的协同设计技术结合使用，以获得针对给定任务的高精度的最佳性能模型，并最大限度地减少延迟、能耗和芯片面积。所获得的变压器-加速器对的精度比最先进的对提高了 0.3%，同时花费 5.2× 更低的延迟和 3.0× 更低的能耗。

items.title: SCV-GNN: Sparse Compressed Vector-Based Graph Neural Network Aggregation.
items.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have emerged as a powerful tool to process graph-based data in fields like communication networks, molecular interactions, chemistry, social networks, and neuroscience. GNNs are characterized by the ultrasparse nature of their adjacency matrix that necessitates the development of dedicated hardware beyond general-purpose sparse matrix multipliers. While there has been extensive research on designing dedicated hardware accelerators for GNNs, few have extensively explored the impact of the sparse storage format on the efficiency of the GNN accelerators. This article proposes SCV-GNN with the novel sparse compressed vectors (SCVs) format optimized for the aggregation operation. We use Z -Morton ordering to derive a data-locality-based computation ordering and partitioning scheme. This article also presents how the proposed SCV-GNN is scalable on a vector processing system. Experimental results over various datasets show that the proposed method achieves a geometric mean speedup of 7.96× and 7.04× over compressed sparse column (CSC) and compressed sparse row (CSR) aggregation operations, respectively. The proposed method also reduces the memory traffic by a factor of 3.29× and 4.37× over CSC and CSR, respectively. Thus, the proposed novel aggregation format reduces the latency and memory access for GNN inference.
items.abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 已成为处理通信网络、分子相互作用、化学、社交网络和神经科学等领域基于图的数据的强大工具。 GNN 的特点是邻接矩阵的超稀疏性质，这需要开发通用稀疏矩阵乘法器之外的专用硬件。虽然在为 GNN 设计专用硬件加速器方面已经进行了大量研究，但很少有人广泛探讨稀疏存储格式对 GNN 加速器效率的影响。本文提出了 SCV-GNN，其新颖的稀疏压缩向量（SCV）格式针对聚合操作进行了优化。我们使用 Z -Morton 排序来导出基于数据局部性的计算排序和分区方案。本文还介绍了所提出的 SCV-GNN 如何在矢量处理系统上进行扩展。各种数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法实现了 7.96× 的几何平均加速比 7.04× 分别通过压缩稀疏列 (CSC) 和压缩稀疏行 (CSR) 聚合操作。该方法还将内存流量减少了 3.29× 和 4.37× 分别超过 CSC 和 CSR。因此，所提出的新颖聚合格式减少了 GNN 推理的延迟和内存访问。

items.title: Snap-3D: A Constrained Placement-Driven Physical Design Methodology for High Performance 3-D ICs.
items.abstract: 3-D integration technology is one of the leading options to advance Moore’s Law beyond conventional scaling. One of the 3-D integration choice is the heterogeneous integration with the benefits of power saving over the homogeneous integration. With the lack of commercial 3-D tools, existing 3-D physical design flows utilize 2-D commercial tools to perform 3-D integrated circuit (3-D IC) physical synthesis. Specifically, these flows build 2-D designs first and then convert them into 3-D designs. However, several works demonstrate that design qualities degrade during this 2-D–3-D transformation and some of the flows do not support heterogeneous integration. In this article, we propose Snap-3D, a constraint-driven placement approach to build commercial-quality 3-D ICs, which supports both homogeneous and heterogeneous 3-D ICs. Our key idea is based on the observation that if the standard cell height is contracted and partitioned into multiple tiers, any commercial 2-D placer can place them onto the row structure and naturally achieve high-quality 3-D placement. This methodology is shown to optimize power, performance, and area (PPA) metrics across different tiers simultaneously and minimize the aforementioned design quality loss. Experimental results on seven industrial designs demonstrate that Snap-3D achieves up to 10.9% wirelength, 9% power, and 25% performance improvements compared with state-of-the-art 3-D design flows.
items.abstract_zh: 3D 集成技术是超越传统缩放比例推进摩尔定律的主要选择之一。 3D 集成选择之一是异构集成，与同构集成相比，异构集成具有节能的优点。由于缺乏商业3D工具，现有的3D物理设计流程利用2D商业工具来执行3D集成电路（3D IC）物理综合。具体来说，这些流程首先构建 2D 设计，然后将其转换为 3D 设计。然而，一些工作表明，在 2-D-3-D 转换过程中设计质量会下降，并且某些流程不支持异构集成。在本文中，我们提出了 Snap-3D，这是一种用于构建商业质量 3D IC 的约束驱动布局方法，它支持同构和异构 3D IC。我们的主要想法是基于这样的观察：如果标准单元高度收缩并划分为多个层，则任何商业 2D 布局器都可以将它们放置到行结构上，并自然地实现高质量的 3D 布局。该方法被证明可以同时优化不同层的功耗、性能和面积 (PPA) 指标，并最大限度地减少上述设计质量损失。七种工业设计的实验结果表明，与最先进的 3D 设计流程相比，Snap-3D 的线长提高了 10.9%，功耗提高了 9%，性能提高了 25%。

items.title: Deep-Learning-Driven Random Walk Method for Capacitance Extraction.
items.abstract: Random-walk-based methods for solving partial differential equations (PDEs) exhibit significant advantages and applicability to numerous domains. One of these is parasitic capacitance extraction in modern silicon technologies, where they are essentially called upon to solve a boundary-value problem. In this regime, fast and accurate calculation of Green’s function within the transition domains of the random walk is critical for competitive performance. Silicon processes in advanced nodes introduce complex or special dielectric structures that challenge currently established methods for characterizing Green’s function. In this article, a novel approximation method for Green’s function and Green’s function gradient is presented, which leverages group-equivariant convolutional neural networks (G-CNNs). This can accompany existing multitier Green’s function data precomputation schemes. Additionally, it enables performing the crucial step of sampling according to Green’s function without explicit calculation of Green’s function itself. A novel end-to-end random-walk architecture is discussed which incorporates such deep neural networks, and its utility is demonstrated through numerical experiments. The proposed scheme enjoys massive gains in terms of speed for advanced CMOS nm node setups with nonplanar dielectric media, compared to a straight finite differences method (FDM) solution, while maintaining good accuracy levels.
items.abstract_zh: 基于随机游走的偏微分方程 (PDE) 求解方法表现出显着的优势并适用于众多领域。其中之一是现代硅技术中的寄生电容提取，它们本质上是用来解决边界值问题的。在这种情况下，在随机游走的过渡域内快速准确地计算格林函数对于竞争表现至关重要。先进节点中的硅工艺引入了复杂或特殊的介电结构，这对目前建立的表征格林函数的方法提出了挑战。在本文中，提出了一种利用群等变卷积神经网络（G-CNN）的格林函数和格林函数梯度的新颖近似方法。这可以伴随现有的多层格林函数数据预计算方案。此外，它还可以根据格林函数执行采样的关键步骤，而无需显式计算格林函数本身。讨论了一种新颖的端到端随机游走架构，该架构结合了此类深度神经网络，并通过数值实验证明了其实用性。与直接有限差分法 (FDM) 解决方案相比，所提出的方案在使用非平面电介质介质的高级 CMOS nm 节点设置方面享有巨大的速度提升，同时保持良好的精度水平。

items.title: Geometric Programming Approach to Glitch Minimization via Gate Sizing.
items.abstract: The problem of gate sizing to meet timing specification while minimizing functional power/area is well understood and is solved by the use of geometric programs (GPs). While these area minimization GP (AM-GP) formulations minimize functional power, they do not address the problem of glitches. Glitches are extraneous transitions caused by signal arrival time imbalance at the input nodes of logic gates. A gate sizing algorithm, area-glitch minimization GP (AGM-GP), is proposed to reduce glitches while constraining area and adhering to a timing specification. Glitch reduction is achieved through signal arrival time balancing posed as posynomials in a GP formulation. Prior art does not exploit the complete power of gate sizing when reducing glitches in an attempt to meet the timing specification. In particular, the proposed formulation allows both upsizing and downsizing without causing any timing violation, at the expense of a marginal increase in area. Traditional downsizing methods can be used to further reduce glitches over and above the AGM-GP solution. Simulation results on the ISCAS-85 benchmark circuits show an overall reduction of 20.4% glitch power and 9.5% total power which is, respectively, 13.8% and 3.9% better than just downsizing the AM-GP solution. This power reduction was achieved with an average area increase of 4.2%.
items.abstract_zh: 确定栅极尺寸以满足时序规范同时最小化功能功率/面积的问题是众所周知的，并且可以通过使用几何程序（GP）来解决。虽然这些面积最小化 GP (AM-GP) 公式可以最大限度地减少功能功率，但它们并不能解决故障问题。毛刺是由逻辑门输入节点处的信号到达时间不平衡引起的无关转换。提出了一种栅极尺寸调整算法，即面积毛刺最小化 GP (AGM-GP)，以在限制面积并遵守时序规范的同时减少毛刺。通过在 GP 公式中以多项式形式呈现的信号到达时间平衡来实现毛刺减少。当减少毛刺以试图满足时序规范时，现有技术并没有充分利用栅极尺寸调整的能力。特别是，所提出的公式允许扩大和缩小规模，而不会导致任何时序违规，但代价是面积的边际增加。传统的小型化方法可用于进一步减少 AGM-GP 解决方案之外的故障。 ISCAS-85 基准电路的仿真结果显示，毛刺功率总体降低了 20.4%，总功率降低了 9.5%，比单纯缩小 AM-GP 解决方案的尺寸分别提高了 13.8% 和 3.9%。功率降低的同时，平均面积增加了 4.2%。

items.title: A New Approach to Clock Skewing for Area and Power Optimization of ASICs Using Differential Flipflops and Local Clocking.
items.abstract: A new design methodology for reducing the area and power of standard cell ASICs that uses a combination of differential flipflops and a method of deliberate clock-skewing, called local clocking (LC), is described. LC introduces clock skew without the use of extra buffers in the clock network. This is done by having some flipflops, called sources, generate clock signals for other flipflops, called targets. The method involves two key features: 1) the design of a new differential flipflop, referred to as KVFF, that is functionally identical to a double-latch edge-triggered D flipflop, but in addition, produces a completion signal that is a skewed version of its input clock, which is used to clock other flipflops and 2) an efficient algorithm that identifies the sources and targets involved in the new clocking scheme, with the objective of reducing area and power. These are reduced because deliberate skew introduces extra slack on the logic cones that feed the target flipflops, which is exploited by synthesis tools to reduce area and power. Furthermore, the area and power overhead of conventional methods of introducing skew, e.g., buffers, is eliminated. LC is shown to result in significant improvements in area, power, and wirelength for several, publicly available, benchmark circuits for 65 nm bulk CMOS and 28 nm FDSOI technologies. For 65 nm, the average improvement in area, power and wirelength were 27.7%, 13.4%, and 21.0%, respectively. For 28 nm FDSOI the average improvement in area, power, and wirelength were 20.0%, 10.5%, and 30.5%, respectively. In addition, this article demonstrates how LC can be used to eliminate hold time violations.
items.abstract_zh: 描述了一种减少标准单元 ASIC 面积和功耗的新设计方法，该方法结合使用差分触发器和故意时钟偏移方法（称为本地时钟 (LC)）。 LC 会引入时钟偏差，而无需在时钟网络中使用额外的缓冲区。这是通过让一些触发器（称为源）为其他触发器（称为目标）生成时钟信号来完成的。该方法涉及两个关键特征：1) 设计一个新的差分触发器，称为 KVFF，其功能与双锁存器边沿触发 D 触发器，但除此之外，还产生一个完成信号，该信号是其输入时钟的倾斜版本，用于为其他触发器提供时钟；2）一种有效的算法，用于识别新时钟方案中涉及的源和目标，目的是减少面积和功耗。这些之所以减少，是因为故意的偏斜在为目标触发器供电的逻辑锥上引入了额外的松弛，综合工具利用它来减少面积和功耗。此外，消除了引入偏差的传统方法（例如缓冲器）的面积和功率开销。事实证明，对于 65 nm Bulk CMOS 和 28 nm FDSOI 技术的多种公开基准电路，LC 可在面积、功率和线长方面带来显着改善。对于 65 nm，面积、功率和线长的平均改进分别为 27.7%、13.4% 和 21.0%。对于 28 nm FDSOI，面积、功率和线长的平均改进分别为 20.0%、10.5% 和 30.5%。此外，本文还演示了如何使用 LC 来消除保持时间违规。

items.title: A Noise-Driven Heterogeneous Stochastic Computing Multiplier for Heuristic Precision Improvement in Energy-Efficient DNNs.
items.abstract: Stochastic computing (SC) has become a promising approximate computing solution by its negligible resource occupancy and ultralow energy consumption. As a potential replacement of accurate multiplication, SC can dramatically mitigate the problematic power consumption by DNNs. However, current SC-multipliers illustrate an extremely imbalanced accuracy across product space, i.e., neglectable noise with large products but significant noise for small ones, which is discordant to the distribution of products by the sparse matrix in neural computing. In this article, we present a heterogeneous SC-multiplier that heuristically performs three divergent approximating multiplication, including “set-to-0,” “look-up-table,” and “low-discrepancy-SC,” for appropriate precision-provision in the whole space of products. Due to those popular DNN models cannot achieve consensus on the boundaries of above operations, a training-involved method is proposed to determine the settings with limited overhead. In this way, those models successively learn the SC-operation characters and exhibit a definitely improvement on network precision. The experiment shows that, for single multiplication, the product noise can be restrained by 36.86% on average, and for multiplication in multiple network models, the accuracy improvement reaches to 5.5% on average. Furthermore, a group of proposed logic-reduction techniques can improve the energy efficiency by 65% in the system-level evaluation.
items.abstract_zh: 随机计算（SC）以其可忽略的资源占用和超低的能耗成为一种有前途的近似计算解决方案。作为精确乘法的潜在替代品，SC 可以极大地减轻 DNN 的功耗问题。然而，当前的 SC 乘法器在乘积空间上表现出极其不平衡的精度，即，大乘积的噪声可以忽略不计，但小乘积的噪声却很大，这与神经计算中稀疏矩阵的乘积分布不一致。在本文中，我们提出了一种异构 SC 乘法器，它启发式地执行三种不同的近似乘法，包括“设置为 0”、“查找表”和“低差异 SC”，以便在整个产品空间中提供适当的精度。由于那些流行的 DNN 模型无法就上述操作的边界达成共识，因此提出了一种涉及训练的方法来确定开销有限的设置。通过这种方式，这些模型相继学习了 SC 操作特性，并在网络精度上表现出明显的提高。实验表明，对于单次乘法，乘积噪声平均可以抑制36.86%，对于多网络模型中的乘法，平均精度提升达到5.5%。 Furthermore, a group of proposed logic-reduction techniques can improve the energy efficiency by 65% in the system-level evaluation.

items.title: Hierarchical Relational Graph Learning for Autonomous Multirobot Cooperative Navigation in Dynamic Environments.
items.abstract: As a specific kind of cyber–physical systems (CPSs), autonomous robot clusters play an important role in various intelligent manufacturing fields. However, due to the increasing design complexity of robot clusters, it is becoming more and more challenging to guarantee the safety and efficiency for multirobot cooperative navigation in dynamic and complex environments. Although deep reinforcement learning (DRL) shows great potential in learning multirobot cooperative navigation policies, existing DRL-based approaches suffer from scalability issues and rarely consider the transferability of trained policies to new tasks. To address these problems, this article presents a novel DRL-based multirobot cooperative navigation approach named HRMR-Navi that equips each robot with both a two-layered hierarchical graph network model and an attention-based communication model. In our approach, the hierarchical graph network model can efficiently figure out hierarchical relations among all agents that either cooperate for efficiency or avoid obstacles for safety to derive more advanced strategies, and the communication model can accurately form a global view of the environment for a specific robot, thus, the multirobot cooperation efficiency can be further strengthened. Meanwhile, we propose an improved proximal policy optimization (PPO) algorithm based on the Maximum Entropy Reinforcement Learning, named MEPPO, to enhance the robot exploration ability. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate that, compared with state-of-the-art approaches, HRMR-Navi can achieve more efficient cooperative navigation with less time cost, lower collision rate, higher scalability, and better knowledge transferability.
items.abstract_zh: 作为一种特殊的信息物理系统（CPS），自主机器人集群在智能制造的各个领域发挥着重要作用。然而，由于机器人集群的设计复杂性不断增加，保证动态复杂环境下多机器人协作导航的安全性和高效性变得越来越具有挑战性。尽管深度强化学习（DRL）在学习多机器人协作导航策略方面显示出巨大潜力，但现有的基于 DRL 的方法存在可扩展性问题，并且很少考虑训练后的策略到新任务的可迁移性。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种名为 HRMR-Navi 的新型基于 DRL 的多机器人协作导航方法，该方法为每个机器人配备了两层分层图网络模型和基于注意力的通信模型。在我们的方法中，层次图网络模型可以有效地找出所有智能体之间的层次关系，这些智能体要么为了效率而合作，要么为了安全而避开障碍，从而得出更先进的策略，并且通信模型可以准确地形成特定机器人的环境全局视图，从而进一步加强多机器人协作效率。同时，我们提出了一种基于最大熵强化学习的改进近端策略优化（PPO）算法MEPPO，以增强机器人的探索能力。综合实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，HRMR-Navi 可以以更少的时间成本、更低的碰撞率、更高的可扩展性和更好的知识可转移性实现更高效的协作导航。

items.title: A Fast FPGA Connection Router Using Prerouting-Based Parallel Local Routing Algorithm.
items.abstract: Routing is one of the most time-consuming steps in the field-programmable gate array (FPGA) design process. Even if unceasing efforts have been made to accelerate FPGA routing, the existing work seldom pays attention to the underlying FPGA connection router. In this article, we present a fast FPGA connection router called PRoute which implements a novel prerouting-based parallel local routing algorithm. Basically, PRoute precomputes the potential routing solutions for various connection patterns on FPGAs, which can be directly used in the later practical routing. On the whole, PRoute is composed of A-star maze expansion and parallel local search. In the first part, PRoute gradually expands the maze wavefront toward the lowest-cost node to search for the target sink. For a wire-type node, PRoute invokes a fast parallel local search instead taking advantage of the prerouting results, and hence the time-expensive maze expansion can be reduced. Particularly, it allows PRoute to call one another between A-star maze expansion and parallel local search. This enables the runtime efficiency of PRoute while ensuring its global search ability. In addition, we put forward an engineering improvement to further speed up PRoute by avoiding the exploration of block output pins. To our best knowledge, this work is the first to apply the idea of prerouting for FPGAs. Experimental results show that PRoute achieves speedups of 1.8× , 2.4× , 3.2× , 4.1× , and 5.1× with 1, 4, 8, 16, and 32 threads relative to the baseline versatile place to route’s connection router, respectively, without degrading the quality of results.
items.abstract_zh: 布线是现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 设计过程中最耗时的步骤之一。即使不断努力加速FPGA布线，现有的工作却很少关注底层的FPGA连接路由器。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 PRoute 的快速 FPGA 连接路由器，它实现了一种新颖的基于预路由的并行本地路由算法。 PRoute基本上是在FPGA上预先计算出各种连接模式的潜在布线方案，可以直接用于后期的实际布线。整体来看，PRoute由A星迷宫扩展和并行局部搜索组成。在第一部分中，PRoute逐渐将迷宫波前向成本最低的节点扩展，以搜索目标汇。对于线型节点，PRoute 调用快速并行局部搜索，而不是利用预路由结果，因此可以减少耗时的迷宫扩展。特别是它允许PRoute在A星迷宫扩展和并行局部搜索之间相互调用。这样既保证了PRoute的运行效率，又保证了其全局搜索能力。此外，我们提出了一项工程改进，通过避免探索块输出引脚来进一步加速 PRoute。据我们所知，这项工作是第一个将预路由思想应用于 FPGA 的工作。实验结果表明，PRoute 的加速效果为 1.8× , 2.4× , $3.2\times $ , 4.1× 和 5.1× 相对于路由连接路由器的基线通用位置有 1、4、8、16 和 32 个线程，分别，而不降低结果的质量。

items.title: ProMiSE: A High-Performance Programmable Hardware Monitor for High Security Enforcement of Software Execution.
items.abstract: In recent years, to prevent computer systems from software attacks, hardware monitors are proposed as a type of efficient security enforcement scheme, which can detect software attacks at runtime. However, due to the limited flexibility of dedicated hardware monitors, one monitor can be only applied to a few targeted application scenarios, and is hard to defend against unconsidered attacks. This leads to high cost for redesigning monitors for new scenarios. Although recent studies propose flexible hardware monitors, the scope and security of the reconfigurable monitoring policies are still limited. To further improve the flexibility and security, this work proposes a monitor instruction set and multiple security-assisting designs for supporting general operations needed by various attack detection schemes. Based on the above efforts, an efficient programmable hardware monitor named ProMiSE is designed. After implemented on the RocketChip RISC-V processor, ProMiSE can be programmed to realize a wider range of monitoring policies with higher security and similar hardware resource overhead, compared with state-of-the-art flexible hardware monitors. With these advantages, ProMiSE still has the detection latency as low as 18–59 CPU cycles. The performance overhead ranges from \sim 0% to 23.4%, which is also reasonable compared with the dedicated hardware monitors of corresponding policies.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，为了防止计算机系统受到软件攻击，硬件监视器被提出作为一种有效的安全执行方案，它可以在运行时检测软件攻击。然而，由于专用硬件监视器的灵活性有限，一台监视器只能应用于少数有针对性的应用场景，并且难以防御未经考虑的攻击。这导致为新场景重新设计监视器的成本很高。尽管最近的研究提出了灵活的硬件监控器，但可重构监控策略的范围和安全性仍然有限。为了进一步提高灵活性和安全性，本工作提出了监控指令集和多种安全辅助设计，以支持各种攻击检测方案所需的通用操作。基于以上工作，设计了一种高效的可编程硬件监视器ProMiSE。在RocketChip RISC-V处理器上实现后，与最先进的灵活硬件监控器相比，ProMiSE可以通过编程实现更广泛的监控策略，具有更高的安全性和类似的硬件资源开销。凭借这些优势，ProMiSE 的检测延迟仍然低至 18-59 个 CPU 周期。性能开销范围为 \sim 0% 到 23.4%，与相应策略的专用硬件监视器相比也比较合理。

items.title: FCRoute: A Fast FPGA Connection Router Using Soft Routing-Space Pruning Algorithm.
items.abstract: Routing is one of the most time-consuming stages in the field-programmable gate array (FPGA) design flow. Even if various attempts have been made to reduce route time, the existing work rarely focuses on improving the underlying A*-based FPGA connection router. In this article, we present a fast FPGA connection router called FCRoute based on a novel soft routing-space pruning algorithm. Within FCRoute, a routing resource priority mechanism is applied to classify the routing resource nodes into high-priority nodes and low-priority ones. On the whole, FCRoute is composed of fast maze search and backtracking process. During the fast maze search, we explore only the high-priority nodes in the routing space. In this way, a great deal of unnecessary work can be avoided. When the fast maze search fails to find the target sink, it allows the backtracking process to explore the low-priority nodes promising to be on the best path, after which a new fast maze search is called. By avoiding the exploration of the majority of low-priority nodes, FCRoute maintains runtime efficiency while ensuring global search ability. In addition, we further accelerate FCRoute with an engineering enhancement which simplifies the cost computations of nodes. Runtime and quality of results are compared with the state-of-the-art connection router in VPR 8. Experimental results show that on average FCRoute explores less than half the number of routing resource nodes, and therefore reduces runtime by 38% while enabling the quality of results. When combined with the enhancement, FCRoute achieves an average 45% reduction on runtime without sacrificing the quality of results.
items.abstract_zh: 布线是现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 设计流程中最耗时的阶段之一。即使已经做出了各种尝试来减少布线时间，现有的工作很少集中于改进底层基于 A* 的 FPGA 连接路由器。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 FCRoute 的快速 FPGA 连接路由器，它基于一种新颖的软路由空间修剪算法。 FCRoute内部采用路由资源优先级机制，将路由资源节点分为高优先级节点和低优先级节点。整体而言，FCRoute由快速迷宫搜索和回溯过程组成。在快速迷宫搜索过程中，我们仅探索路由空间中的高优先级节点。这样就可以避免大量不必要的工作。当快速迷宫搜索未能找到目标汇时，它允许回溯过程探索有希望位于最佳路径上的低优先级节点，之后调用新的快速迷宫搜索。通过避免对大多数低优先级节点的探索，FCRoute 在保证全局搜索能力的同时保持了运行效率。此外，我们还通过工程增强进一步加速 FCRoute，简化了节点的成本计算。将运行时间和结果质量与 VPR 8 中最先进的连接路由器进行了比较。实验结果表明，FCRoute 平均探索的路由资源节点数量不到一半，因此在保证结果质量的同时，运行时间减少了 38%。与增强功能相结合后，FCRoute 在不牺牲结果质量的情况下，运行时间平均减少了 45%。

items.title: Efficient Arithmetic Block Identification With Graph Learning and Network-Flow.
items.abstract: Arithmetic block identification in gate-level netlists plays an essential role for various purposes, including malicious logic detection, functional verification, or macro-block optimization. However, current methods usually suffer from either low performance or poor scalability. To address the issue, we come up with a novel framework based on graph learning and network flow analysis, that extracts desired logic components from a complete circuit netlist. We design a novel asynchronous bidirectional graph neural network (ABGNN) dedicated to representation learning on directed acyclic graphs. In addition, we develop a convex cost network-flow-based datapath extraction approach to match the predicted block inputs with predicted block outputs. Experimental results on open-source RISC-V CPU designs demonstrate that our proposed solution significantly outperforms several state-of-the-art arithmetic block identification flows.
items.abstract_zh: 门级网表中的算术块识别对于各种目的发挥着重要作用，包括恶意逻辑检测、功能验证或宏块优化。然而，当前的方法通常性能低下或可扩展性差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于图学习和网络流分析的新颖框架，该框架从完整的电路网表中提取所需的逻辑组件。我们设计了一种新颖的异步双向图神经网络（ABGNN），致力于有向无环图的表示学习。此外，我们开发了一种基于凸成本网络流的数据路径提取方法，以将预测块输入与预测块输出进行匹配。开源 RISC-V CPU 设计的实验结果表明，我们提出的解决方案显着优于几种最先进的算术块识别流程。

items.title: Cooperative Buffer Management With Fine-Grained Data Migrations for Hybrid Memory Systems.
items.abstract: Hybrid memory composed of DRAM and persistent memory (PM) offers a promising way to realize large-capacity main memory supporting in-memory data storage and computing. However, traditional buffer management schemes focus on improving the hit ratio but lack awareness of the limitations of PM, e.g., slower write time and lower write endurance than DRAM. Therefore, developing new buffer management policies that can reduce costly write-backs of PM blocks while maintaining high performance for the hybrid buffer, is of paramount importance. Existing approaches mainly use a page-grained buffering policy, which will cause unnecessary data migrations between DRAM and PM, leading to a high number of disk I/Os and PM writes. Aiming to reduce I/O costs and PM writes, we propose a new buffer manager named HiBuffer for DRAM/PM-based hybrid memory systems. HiBuffer presents several novel ideas. First, it adopts multigrained data layouts to manage the hybrid buffer cooperatively. In addition to the page granularity, we introduce Lines for the DRAM buffer and Sectors to the PM buffer, forming a buffer with three granularities, including Line, Sector, and Page. We prove that the multigrained cooperative buffer management can deliver higher performance than existing page-grained schemes. Second, we propose a sector-grained method to migrate data from DRAM to PM, which can avoid unnecessary data movements and reduce PM writes. Third, we use an out-of-place updating mechanism to absorb updates in DRAM, which can further reduce the writes to PM. We compare HiBuffer with three existing schemes, including LRU, CLOCK-DWF, and MiniPage, on five synthetic workloads and the YCSB benchmark using real Intel Optane DC PM. The results in terms of various metrics, including running time, PM writes, hit ratio, and disk I/Os, suggest the efficiency of HiBuffer. In particular, HiBuffer reduces the running time by up to 37.8% and the writes to PM by up to 83% compared to the competitors when evaluated on the YCSB benchmark.
items.abstract_zh: 由 DRAM 和持久存储器 (PM) 组成的混合存储器为实现支持内存数据存储和计算的大容量主存储器提供了一种有前景的方法。然而，传统的缓冲区管理方案专注于提高命中率，但缺乏对 PM 局限性的认识，例如，比 DRAM 写入时间更慢、写入耐久性更低。因此，开发新的缓冲区管理策略至关重要，该策略可以减少昂贵的 PM 块写回，同时保持混合缓冲区的高性能。现有的方法主要使用页粒度缓冲策略，这会导致DRAM和PM之间不必要的数据迁移，从而导致大量的磁盘I/O和PM写入。为了降低 I/O 成本和 PM 写入，我们为基于 DRAM/PM 的混合内存系统提出了一种名为 HiBuffer 的新缓冲区管理器。 HiBuffer 提出了几个新颖的想法。首先，它采用多粒度数据布局来协同管理混合缓冲区。除了页粒度外，我们还为 DRAM 缓冲区引入 Lines，为 PM 缓冲区引入 Sectors，形成 Line、Sector 和 Page 三种粒度的缓冲区。我们证明，多粒度协作缓冲区管理可以提供比现有页粒度方案更高的性能。其次，我们提出了一种扇区粒度的方法将数据从 DRAM 迁移到 PM，这可以避免不必要的数据移动并减少 PM 写入。第三，我们使用异地更新机制来吸收DRAM中的更新，这可以进一步减少对PM的写入。我们将 HiBuffer 与三种现有方案（包括 LRU、CLOCK-DWF 和 MiniPage）在五种合成工作负载上进行比较，并使用真正的英特尔傲腾 DC PM 进行 YCSB 基准测试。各种指标（包括运行时间、PM 写入、命中率和磁盘 I/O）的结果表明了 HiBuffer 的效率。特别是，在 YCSB 基准测试中，与竞争对手相比，HiBuffer 的运行时间最多可减少 37.8%，PM 写入最多可减少 83%。

items.title: VoxImp: Impedance Extraction Simulator for Voxelized Structures.
items.abstract: An impedance extractor, called VoxImp, is proposed to compute the impedances of the structures discretized by voxels. VoxImp iteratively solves the volume-surface integral equations discretized by a carefully selected set of basis functions. During iterative solution, matrix-vector multiplications are accelerated by the fast Fourier transform, while the rapid convergence of the iterative solution at resonant frequencies is ensured by a novel sparse preconditioner. The memory requirement of the sparse preconditioner is reduced by a sparse LU decomposition obtained by a multifrontal algorithm with compressed frontal matrices. The overall memory requirement of the VoxImp is further reduced by the Tucker decomposition. VoxImp’s accuracy, efficiency, and capability are demonstrated through impedance extraction of various voxelized structures, including an RF coil array discretized by more than four million voxels and 15 million panels and analyzed on a commodity desktop computer.
items.abstract_zh: 提出了一种称为 VoxImp 的阻抗提取器来计算由体素离散的结构的阻抗。 VoxImp 迭代求解由一组精心选择的基函数离散化的体积-表面积分方程。在迭代求解过程中，快速傅里叶变换加速了矩阵向量乘法，而新颖的稀疏预处理器确保了迭代解在谐振频率下的快速收敛。通过使用压缩额矩阵的多额算法获得稀疏 LU 分解，可以减少稀疏预处理器的内存需求。 Tucker 分解进一步降低了 VoxImp 的总体内存需求。 VoxImp 的准确性、效率和功能通过各种体素化结构的阻抗提取得到证明，包括由超过 400 万个体素和 1500 万个面板离散化的 RF 线圈阵列，并在商用台式计算机上进行分析。

items.title: Design and Blocking Analysis of Locking Protocols for Real-Time DAG Tasks Under Federated Scheduling.
items.abstract: Real-time systems require locking protocols to coordinate access to shared resources. With the booming revolution of parallel processing technology in real-time systems, there has been some work addressing the problem of extending classic locking protocols for sequential real-time tasks to parallel tasks. However, it may not be most effective to trivially follow the progress mechanisms and queue orders designed for sequential tasks since the intrastructure information within a parallel task is not taken into consideration. This article investigates the design of locking protocols for parallel tasks using a novel mechanism—longest normal Section first (LNSF)—to consider the impact of normal sections on blocking behavior in parallel tasks and further improve real-time performance. LNSF is then implemented in a locking protocol for parallel tasks named POMIP, and associated blocking analysis techniques are presented. Empirical evaluations show that our proposed analysis dominated other state-of-the-art analysis—in best cases, the acceptance ratio of the task set can be improved by around 17%.
items.abstract_zh: 实时系统需要锁定协议来协调对共享资源的访问。随着实时系统中并行处理技术的蓬勃发展，已经有一些工作致力于解决将顺序实时任务的经典锁定协议扩展到并行任务的问题。然而，简单地遵循为顺序任务设计的进度机制和队列顺序可能不是最有效的，因为没有考虑并行任务内的内部结构信息。本文研究了并行任务的锁定协议的设计，使用一种新颖的机制——最长正常节优先（LNSF）——来考虑正常节对并行任务中阻塞行为的影响，并进一步提高实时性能。然后，LNSF 在名为 POMIP 的并行任务锁定协议中实现，并介绍了相关的阻塞分析技术。实证评估表明，我们提出的分析主导了其他最先进的分析——在最好的情况下，任务集的接受率可以提高约 17%。

items.title: Warp-Aware Adaptive Energy Efficiency Calibration for Multi-GPU Systems.
items.abstract: Massive GPU acceleration processors have been used in high-performance computing systems. The Dennard scaling has led to power and thermal constraints limiting the performance of such systems. The demand for both increased performance and energy efficiency is highly desired. This article presents a multilayer low-power optimization method for warps and tasks parallelisms. We present a dynamic frequency regulation scheme for performance parameters in terms of load balance and load imbalance. The method monitors the energy parameters in runtime and adjusts adaptively the voltage level to ensure performance efficiency with energy reduction. The experimental results show that the multilayer low-power optimization with dynamic frequency regulation can achieve 40% energy consumption reduction with only 1.6% performance degradation, thus reducing 59% maximum energy consumption. It can further save about 30% energy consumption in comparison with the single-layer energy optimization.
items.abstract_zh: 海量GPU加速处理器已应用于高性能计算系统。登纳德缩放导致功率和热限制限制了此类系统的性能。人们非常渴望提高性能和能源效率。本文提出了一种针对扭曲和任务并行性的多层低功耗优化方法。我们提出了一种针对负载平衡和负载不平衡方面的性能参数的动态频率调节方案。该方法监测运行时的能量参数并自适应调整电压水平，以确保性能效率和节能。实验结果表明，动态调频的多层低功耗优化可实现40%的能耗降低，而性能仅下降1.6%，从而最大降低59%的能耗。与单层能耗优化相比，可进一步节省约30%的能耗。

items.title: Retention-Aware Read Acceleration Strategy for LDPC-Based NAND Flash Memory.
items.abstract: With the strong demand for stable and great quality of service in many network and multimedia services, flash-memory storage systems have been widely adopted in the storage I/O stack in servers and data centers to provide greater access performance. In these services, a huge-size storage system is essential. However, the huge-size flash storage system is very expensive. Flash storage vendors gradually adopt the high-density, low-reliability, and cost-efficient multiple-level cell (MLC) NAND flash memory chip as the major storage medium. Unfortunately, MLC NAND flash memory also brings about the critical issue of the high raw bit error rate. To resolve this issue, vendors adopt the more complex error correction code [such as low-density parity-check (LDPC)]. However, LDPC also results in significant read performance degradation due to its multiple read-retry sensing and decoding steps. To resolve this issue, we proposed a retention-aware read acceleration design (referred to as RRA) for the LDPC-based flash storage system to maintain stable and great read performance without significantly affecting the lifetime. Without significantly modifying the existing flash translation layer (FTL) design, we proposed a retention-aware management module to the existing FTL design. This module can efficiently identify and predict the data access characteristics and precisely allocate the suitable blocks for different data. The proposed design was evaluated with a series of experiments. The experiment results demonstrate that it could effectively reduce average read response time without significantly increasing the number of total live-page copying compared to the typical wear-leveling strategy.
items.abstract_zh: 随着许多网络和多媒体服务对稳定和优质服务的强烈需求，闪存存储系统已广泛应用于服务器和数据中心的存储I/O堆栈中，以提供更高的访问性能。在这些业务中，大规模的存储系统是必不可少的。然而，大容量闪存存储系统的价格非常昂贵。闪存存储厂商逐渐采用高密度、低可靠性、高性价比的MLC NAND闪存芯片作为主要存储介质。不幸的是，MLC NAND闪存也带来了高原始误码率的关键问题。为了解决这个问题，供应商采用了更复杂的纠错码[例如低密度奇偶校验（LDPC）]。然而，LDPC 由于其多个读取重试感测和解码步骤，也会导致读取性能显着下降。为了解决这个问题，我们为基于LDPC的闪存存储系统提出了一种保留感知读取加速设计（简称RRA），以在不显着影响寿命的情况下保持稳定且出色的读取性能。在不显着修改现有闪存转换层（FTL）设计的情况下，我们向现有 FTL 设计提出了保留感知管理模块。该模块可以有效地识别和预测数据访问特征，并为不同的数据精确分配合适的块。通过一系列实验对所提出的设计进行了评估。实验结果表明，与典型的磨损均衡策略相比，它可以有效减少平均读取响应时间，而不会显着增加总实时页复制数量。

items.title: HardGBM: A Framework for Accurate and Hardware-Efficient Gradient Boosting Machines.
items.abstract: Gradient boosting machine (GBM) is a powerful and widely used type of ensemble machine learning methods, among which the most famous one is XGBoost (XGB). However, the cost of running large GBMs on hardware could become prohibitive given stringent resources. Ensemble reduction on boosting ensemble is intrinsically hard because member models are constructed in a sequential order, where the training targets for latter ones depend on the performance of the former ones. In this work, a GBM reduction framework is proposed for the first time to tackle the problem. For the first time, the framework supports automatic hardware implementation of regression tree ensembles. Experiments on 24 datasets from various applications demonstrate that our method reduces overall area utilization by 81.60% (80.64%) and power consumption by 21.15% (19.06%), while exceeding or successfully maintaining the performance level comparing with the original XGB (LightGBM) ensembles. In comparative experiments, to attain approximately the same accuracy level as our framework or XGB, deep learning-based solutions require > 52.7× footprints, 6.0× power consumption, and 1.4× training time. Equipped with tunable parameters, the framework is expected to seek a Pareto optimal front considering hardware resource limitation, accuracy and stability, and computation (training) efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 梯度提升机（GBM）是一种强大且广泛使用的集成机器学习方法，其中最著名的是 XGBoost（XGB）。然而，鉴于资源紧张，在硬件上运行大型 GBM 的成本可能会变得过高。增强集成的集成缩减本质上是困难的，因为成员模型是按顺序构建的，其中后一个模型的训练目标取决于前一个模型的性能。在这项工作中，首次提出了 GBM 缩减框架来解决该问题。该框架首次支持回归树集成的自动硬件实现。对来自不同应用的 24 个数据集的实验表明，与原始 XGB (LightGBM) 集成相比，我们的方法将整体面积利用率降低了 81.60% (80.64%)，功耗降低了 21.15% (19.06%)，同时超过或成功保持了性能水平。在比较实验中，为了达到与我们的框架或 XGB 大致相同的准确度水平，基于深度学习的解决方案需要 > 52.7× 足迹、 6.0× 功耗，以及 1.4× 训练时间。配备可调参数，该框架有望在考虑硬件资源限制、准确性和稳定性以及计算（训练）效率的情况下寻求帕累托最优前沿。

items.title: Layout Aware Optimization Methodology for SOT-MRAM Based on Technically Feasible Top-Pinned Magnetic Tunnel Junction Process.
items.abstract: The emerging spin-orbit torque magnetic random-access memory (SOT-MRAM) shows promising prospects in high-level cache applications due to its subnanosecond switching speed and high reliability. However, SOT-MRAM faces the issue of large bit-cell layout area, which is currently the focus of attention. Although many design and evaluation works have emerged, the lack of a unified standard for realistic SOT process has hindered the development of relevant research toward practicality. In this article, the bit-cell area of the SOT-MRAM will be evaluated and optimized based on the technically feasible process. First of all, based on the state-of-the-art top-pinned SOT nanopillar process, the SOT-MRAM design rules are proposed. On this basis, this article systematically summarizes four basic device layout modes and provides optimized layout suggestions for conventional SOT bit-cells with different types and sizes of devices. In addition, a series of area-efficient SOT bit-cell designs based on the common area (CA) and dual common (DC) solutions are proposed, which can reduce the layout area of SOT bit-cells by up to 38.4% with reasonable write latency and energy overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴的自旋轨道扭矩磁性随机存取存储器（SOT-MRAM）由于其亚纳秒切换速度和高可靠性，在高级缓存应用中显示出广阔的前景。然而，SOT-MRAM面临着位单元布局面积大的问题，这是目前关注的焦点。尽管已经出现了许多设计和评估工作，但由于缺乏现实的SOT过程的统一标准，阻碍了相关研究向实用化方向发展。在本文中，将基于技术上可行的工艺来评估和优化SOT-MRAM的位单元面积。首先，基于最先进的顶钉SOT纳米柱工艺，提出了SOT-MRAM设计规则。在此基础上，本文系统总结了四种基本的器件布局模式，并针对不同类型和尺寸器件的常规SOT位单元提供了优化布局建议。此外，还提出了一系列基于公共区域（CA）和双公共（DC）解决方案的面积高效的SOT位单元设计，可以将SOT位单元的布局面积减少高达38.4%，同时具有合理的写入延迟和能量开销。

items.title: M²NAS: Joint Neural Architecture Optimization System With Network Transmission.
items.abstract: Differentiable neural architecture search (NAS) methods have achieved comparable results for low search costs and high performance.
